programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Long Way Home
programme.desc: 25-year-old Te Puke woman Judy Yorke was a devoted single mum who adored her kids. When she missed her daughter’s fourth birthday party, her family knew something was terribly wrong and reported her missing.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: 54 year old Simon Buis was savagely beaten and kicked to death in an Auckland park in 1980 by persons unknown. To this day, his killers have evaded capture.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: In 2006, 19-year-old Blake Stott died in a mysterious car fire. Blake had seemingly pulled into a South Otago lay-by to have a sleep, when his late-model, un-modified car burst into flames.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Pearl Harbor Phantoms
programme.desc: For the first time ever, TAPS travels to Hawaii to explore one of America's most sacred settings, Pearl Harbor. They are joined in their investigation of the Pacific Aviation Museum by Destination Truth's Josh Gates.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Urgent!
programme.desc: We pick were we last left off, in Hawaii, for the reveal. Jason and Grant were called back for a very important personal case, the Reid House, in Rhode Island, to help a scared 4 year old.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Hill View Manor
programme.desc: The TAPS team has been called out to investigate Hill View Manor in New Castle, Pennsylvania. Once a nursing facility, this now abandoned building is fraught with paranormal activity that allegedly stems from the violent deaths of former patients.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: The TAPS' team is called out to Newport, RI to hold the first ever-paranormal investigation at Seaview Terrace; best recognized from the TV show Dark Shadows.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Evidence
programme.desc: A mother's suicide tortures four generations of one family.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost of Carnegie
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to the Carnegie Library of Homestead, in Pennsylvania to investigate a site that once held violent riots between legendary capitalist, Mr. Carnegie and the steel workers. It is believed that Mr.Carnegie still haunts the library.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Harvesting Murder
programme.desc: A sugar plantation worker tied his daughter to a bed and went to work. Unable to escape, she died in a fire. Claims from the staff of Hawaii's Plantation Village in Waipahu.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Well of Horror
programme.desc: TAPS is joined by Jason's daughter, Haily, on two cases; The Shanley Hotel in Napanoch, New York and Old Fort Niagara, in Youngstown, New York. Both cases involve a gruesome death that took place at a well, instigating paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roasts and Ghosts
programme.desc: The TAPS team is the first paranormal team to ever investigate the famed Friar's Club in New York City. Next, the team travels to the Main Street Armory in Rochester, New York.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Stage Fright
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the team heads to Rapids Theater in Niagara Falls, New York where a lonely actress hanged herself backstage. The staff believes her spirit has never left and is haunting the theater.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Murdered Matron
programme.desc: Special guest investigator Meredith Vieira joins the TAPS team, as they investigate Sailors' Snug Harbor in Staten Island, New York. Once a retirement home to weathered seaman, it's now home to the spirit of a murdered matron.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Bloodiest 47 Acres
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Jefferson City, Missouri, to investigate the notorious Missouri State Penitentiary. A prison that was once named one of the most violent prisons in America.Riots, stabbings and executions left thousands dead over the years.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Voices of Pain
programme.desc: On this episode TAPS heads back to the fan favorite; Waverly Hills Sanatorium in Louisville, Kentucky, an abandoned tuberculosis hospital haunted by its former patients and staff.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Distillery of Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Buffalo Trace Distillery in Frankfort, Kentucky to investigate hauntings at the oldest operating distillery in America.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Membership Denied
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Hartford, CT to Elks Lodge, the oldest and largest secret fraternal organizations in the country. Elks Lodge #19 is shrouded in mystery and tragedy with a gruesome death hanging over its head....and decades of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Christmas Spirit
programme.desc: TAPS gets into the spirit with an investigation of Bethlehem, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roller Ghoster
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS heads to Ohio to investigate Kings Island, anamusement park that sits on land that was thesite of an awful accident.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Buyer Beware
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Naples, New York, to investigate the Naples Hotel.This hotel was built in 1895.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Flooded Souls
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Hales Bar Dam and Marina in Tennessee, to investigate a dam that was built on Native American land.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dead & Breakfast
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS investigates a 19thcentury Bed and Breakfast in Red Boiling Springs, Tennessee, built by the Cloyd family.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cops and Criminals
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cupid in Cuffs
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bonds of Love
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: To Love and to Cherish
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bustin' with Justin
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem - Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Run Fugitive, Run
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Vegas or Bust
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket - Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Playing Possum
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rainy Day Woman
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ticket to Ride
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources - the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then, Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Irons in the Fire
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rocky Mountain Roundup
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: This One's For You
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Baby Lyssa Steps Up
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Inside Out
programme.desc: Dog kickstarts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Growing Up Is Hard To Do
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.
programme.sub-title: Growing Up Is Hard To Do

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Year of the Dog
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Mystery of Mona Lisa
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rusty Cuffs
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Make a Wish
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tough Love
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Surprise Ending
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Big Wipe-Out
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: You Can Bet On It!
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Fly Boy
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Guns & Ice
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Smackdown of Baby Lyssa
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Your Lying Eyes
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit on this case takes them into some parts of Ohau, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sleep Cover
programme.desc: With Korie still in Africa, Willie and Jep must step in and supervise Bella's sleepover. When a couple boys play a prank on the girls, Willie and Jep prove to be the perfect chaperones for the task.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drive-In Revivin'
programme.desc: Korie challenges Willie to come up with a romantic gesture without spending any money. Missy and Jase compete to see who can find a girlfriend for Mountain Man.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fishful Thinking
programme.desc: Jase's hopes to win the inaugural Duck Commander Fishing Tournament is buoyed when he is able to enlist the help of legendary angler Bill Dance. Meanwhile, Willie's vanity over his greying beard leads him to make a questionable decision.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: When Doves Fry
programme.desc: Jase and Jep make a deal with Mia and Merritt to get them to go dove hunting with them. Si tries to make some extra cash by starting a West Monroe tour.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Carpnado
programme.desc: Jumping Asian carp have invaded Monroe's waters so Jase and the guys set out to try to stop them from spreading further. Meanwhile, Willie and Si have to run Willie's Duck Diner for the day.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Campfire Diaries
programme.desc: The family spends a weekend at their childhood summer camp, reliving old memories and working to repair a tennis court Willie built twenty years ago. While at the camp, Jep tries to pass a lifeguard swimming test he failed as a teenager.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Rowdy's Big Day
programme.desc: Rowdy's adoption is finalized and he officially becomes a Robertson. Jase gets his first massage and enjoys it more than he expected.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Disappearing Acts
programme.desc: After Willie and Jase lose Si's tea cup, Si makes them go to great lengths to find it. When the entertainment for Gus's 1st birthday party falls through, Jep fills in as a magician.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Dance Dads
programme.desc: Willie, Korie, Jase and Missy take dance lessons from Sadie to prepare for Reed and Rebecca's upcoming weddings. Jase's plan to perform Reed's wedding ceremony may fall through when he waits until the last minute to renew his ordainment.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: End of an Era
programme.desc: When Si decides to retire to pursue a music career, the family organizes a party in his honor. Meanwhile, Willie, Phil, and Jase take a road trip to try to recreate an old duck call for Si's retirement gift.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Looking Back and Talking Quack
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a look back at 130 episodes of Duck Dynasty.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Grass & The Furious
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck for the Duckmen when an old high school nemesis challenges them to a good old-fashioned race.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Driving Miss Sadie
programme.desc: With Sadie's driver's license test fast approaching, she finds herself in dire need of lessons. Willie, Jase and Si each set out to correct her glaring failures behind the wheel by teaching her how to drive... Robertson-style.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Truck Commander
programme.desc: After Willie's son, John Luke, leaves Willie's pickup in the driveway with a bone-dry gas tank, Willie and Korie decide that it's time to get the kid his own car.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Si-Yonara
programme.desc: The Duck Commander assembly room gets an unexpected shakeup when a disgruntled Si decides to quit his job.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fowl Play
programme.desc: Willie finds his office in shambles and alerts the authorities that the warehouse has had a break in.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sweatin' Bullets
programme.desc: When a heat wave envelops West Monroe the air conditioning unit at the Duck Commander warehouse goes down, turning the duck call assembly room into a boiling sweatshop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Spring Pong Cleaning
programme.desc: After Korie decides the junk piles in the Duck Commander warehouse are beginning to reach critical mass, she calls on Willie and the guys to do a little company spring-cleaning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Morning, West Monroe
programme.desc: After attending a local radio show as a guest, Willie sees an opportunity to host a show of his own.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Of Mattresses and Men
programme.desc: The Jase, Si and the guys from the duck call room take a field trip to a brand new local donut shop and quickly find out who amongst them can eat the most delicious treats.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Samurai Si
programme.desc: Willie receives a special gift from a Japanese business associate - a "priceless" samurai sword, which Willie keeps out of the hands of Jase and the guys.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck No, We Won't Go
programme.desc: Willie pushes his work force too far after implementing new "motivational work tactics," and the guys rise up against him and go on strike.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drag Me To Glory
programme.desc: When NASCAR sensation Clint Bowyer pays a visit to the Duck Commander warehouse, Willie and the guys are fired up to spend the day hanging out with the professional racecar driver.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Season Eve
programme.desc: Tomorrow is the opening day of Duck Season and the men are carrying on their tradition of camping on the Robertson Land the night before.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Can't Hardly Weight
programme.desc: Gearing up for his high school reunion, Willie realizes that he could stand to lose a few pounds. Jase and Korie set out to help him drop some weight and the strenuous battle of man-versus-waistline begins.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Shot Thru The Heart
programme.desc: The guys learn from Willie that John Luke is going through his first break up. In order to make him feel better the men decide to take John Luke hunting for nutria, and impart their relationship wisdom.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Lizard, Lizard
programme.desc: When the warehouse guys new office pet (a lizard) escapes, they try all they can in order to catch the wily reptile. Proving impossible, the guys finally decide to bring in the big guns to help trap it--Mr. Phil Robertson.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hallu-Si-Nations
programme.desc: With Willie out-of-town, the guys decide to flake off work and leave to brush up the duck blinds on the Robertson land. While out, Si believes he spots what he thinks is the infamous 'Black Panther'.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Let's Go Hunting, Deer
programme.desc: Willie and Jase invite Korie and Missy along on a deer hunt because they believe their wives have become too "city." At Phil and Kay's, Miss Kay decides she wants to frame Phil's original blueprints from the first duck call he created.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Tickets To The Fun Show
programme.desc: During Duck Commander's "Casino Night" party, Si Robertson wins the grand prize of $2000 and decides to buy a massage chair for the duck call room. The massage chair becomes a detriment to the workflow, so Willie takes Si around for a replacement prize.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Be a Lady
programme.desc: Sadie, has a homecoming dance coming up, but Willie doesn't approve of her dress selection. Willie decides to take Sadie out to find her a new "appropriate" dress.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ring Around the Redneck
programme.desc: Though Jase lost his wedding ring long ago, Missy decides it's time for Jase to replace it with a new one. When Jase is duck hunting, once again, he loses the ring.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bass Man Standing
programme.desc: The Duck Commander team is invited to unveil a wing of the local Bass Pro shop that will feature their products.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Battle of the Brothers
programme.desc: Willie's suspicious behavior from dyeing his beard to buying a new motorcycle, makes Jase come to the conclusion that Willie is having a mid-life crisis.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Aloha, Robertsons!
programme.desc: After all their hard work, Willie decides to take the entire Robertson clan on a family vacation to Hawaii. But Willie's daily itinerary for the trip gets constantly undermined by the family's desire to participate in their own island activities.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Till Duck Do Us Part
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane".

programme.title: Timber Kings: High Rollers
programme.desc: Just hours from Manhattan, Beat creates a country retreat for a demanding French financier, while Joel’s Australian client makes a last minute request for a three-car garage.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Trial By Fire
programme.desc: In foggy Newfoundland, Peter builds a duck-hunting cabin and gets initiated into island culture.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: In Northern BC, a challenging modern log home has Beat and his crew risking life and limb. Meantime, Joel and Bryan Sr. take a chance on hiring an eccentric perfectionist to carve a life-size statue on a tight deadline.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Active Duty
programme.desc: In California, Joel is under the gun, with a job that’s behind schedule before it even begins. Meanwhile, Beat marshals the troops to finish a mega project on the verge of shipping out.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Make a Mark
programme.desc: Bryan Jr. makes a mark in the self-proclaimed log home capital of the world. Back at the yard, Andre tries to control Peter when his pent-up creativity goes in overdrive.

programme.title: Timber Kings: The Getaway
programme.desc: As winter approaches, the rush to build two summer getaway homes is on. Peter leads his team in Alberta while Bryan Jr. and his guys head north to Alaska.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Great Expectations
programme.desc: In upstate New York, Beat builds three grandiose gazebos for two brothers with neighbouring properties. Back home, Bryan Jr. asks his son Little Man to take charge of his first build ever.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Planes, Cranes and Automobiles
programme.desc: Beat takes on his biggest build this season, a 15,000 square foot mansion with logs so massive they tax the crane and crew to the limits.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Good As New
programme.desc: On a two-man build in Alberta, Joel and his right-hand man Shawn are challenged by broken logs and stubborn headers.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Barn Burner
programme.desc: After Beat and Sam build a beautiful home in Alberta, the clients egg them on to a paint ball battle on their acreage.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Timber Kings: Behind the Sawdust
programme.desc: Timber Kings: Behind the Sawdust captures the world’s best log home craftsmen like never before! This one-hour special takes you behind the scenes.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Cliffside Castle
programme.desc: Beat takes on one of the most perilous builds of his career, a luxury twin-turreted vacation home on the edge of 100-foot cliff.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Coming Home
programme.desc: In Alberta, Beat is tasked with building one man’s dream home on the picturesque farmland where he grew up.

programme.title: Timber Kings: It’s a Dirty Job
programme.desc: A reluctant Joel joins forces with his wife to construct a backyard obstacle course that he hopes will prepare them for one Tough Mudder of a race.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Peter helps restore a Manitoba couple’s love for logs by building a home to replace the one they tragically lost to fire. Meanwhile, the renovation of a neighborhood bar nearly drives Bryan Jr. to drink.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Frying Pan into the Fire
programme.desc: Bryan Jr. whips up an outdoor kitchen before hitting the beach in search of the ultimate driftwood bar.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Going for Gold
programme.desc: Joel takes on the mother of all builds – a 20,000-sq./ft. Pennsylvania mansion complete with walk through tree, hand-carved totem pole and 3-story spiral log staircase.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Take to the Trees
programme.desc: Peter may have met his match when he builds a mountainside ski cabin for a client experienced in log-home building.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Living the Dream
programme.desc: Beat builds a lottery winner’s 7,000-sq.ft. dream home in northern Alberta. Meanwhile, Peter must beg, borrow and steal to deliver on two high profile entryways for Canada’s Winter Games.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Night Sweats
programme.desc: Beat battles a stuck truck in the middle of the night, then builds in darkness to meet his deadline on a home in northern Ontario.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Quarantine
programme.desc: The bad news is Nikki’s stuck in quarantine. The good news is Professor Oglevee’s stuck with her.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: And the Band Plays On
programme.desc: T’s band gets a big break, but the show may have to go on without Kim.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Trading Places
programme.desc: While the Professor’s evil twin romances Nikki, Kim and Stevie try to 'lose' their loser dates.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: A SIMPLE PLAN
programme.desc: Kim’s new car comes with an unusual option package: $250,000 stuffed in the spare tire.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: MOVING ON OUT
programme.desc: After Kim and Stevie move into their own apartment their mothers have a tough time cutting the apron strings.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: UNFORGIVEN
programme.desc: Nineteen years ago, Kim’s birth divided Nikki and her father; now, only Kim can mend their family feud.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: No Judgement
programme.desc: Andi struggles to keep her personal life and job separate. Developments in Karen's love life poses new possibilities. Sabrina provides the voice of wisdom to her friends. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Boy Bye
programme.desc: Andi acts quickly to help a fallen friend. A misunderstanding leaves Karen in a precarious and heartbreaking situation. Danni starts to address rumors she's caught wind of. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Old Faithful
programme.desc: Andi finds herself stuck between a rock and a hard place. Danni sets out to find the truth among her friends. Sabrina finally starts to open up to Calvin. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Acceptance
programme.desc: Danni's relationship with an unlikely person develops in an unexpected twist. Aaron recruits Andi's help. Sabrina tries to figure out the shift in Karen's attitude. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Revelations
programme.desc: Andi's suspicions are raised concerning her lover. Sabrina and Calvin start to make progress. Danni still has a chip on her shoulder, but sets it aside in favour of helping Andi. (S1, ep10)

programme.title: The Game: Away Game
programme.desc: Derwin invites Melanie to his first away game in Miami, but due to her heavy school load, she decides to pass.

programme.title: The Game: The Rules Of The Game
programme.desc: As a favor to Derwin, Melanie attends the first Saber Sunbeam meeting of the season, only to learn that unlike the wives, football players "girlfriends" are not considered legitimate and are treated as such by the other wives.

programme.title: The Game: Gifted
programme.desc: When Melanie sends gifts to the football team on behalf of Derwin in honor of the first game, Derwin gets teased and his teammates Jason and Malik feel pressured to reciprocate. A gift giving competition ensues.

programme.title: The Game: How Tasha Got Her Groove Back
programme.desc: When Malik tells Tasha that he is having trouble with the offensive coordinator, Kenny, he asks her to speak with him.
programme.sub-title: How Tasha Got Her Groove Back

programme.title: The Game: Brittany's Super Sweet Sixth
programme.desc: When Kelley's daughter tells her she wants an extravagant birthday party like the rest of her friends, Kelly approaches Jason for money and he refuses.

programme.title: The Game: Rift And Separate
programme.desc: A minor argument escalates into a major locker room rigt between Jason and Malik that affects their playing relationship on the field.

programme.title: The Game: Mi Casa Es Su Casa
programme.desc: When Tasha returns early from a trip she finds Malik throwing a wild party at their house and shuts it down.

programme.title: The Game: The Trey Wiggs Episode
programme.desc: When Derwin's image consultant tells Derwin her idea to pair him with football player Trey Wiggs, his former college teammate, he objects, saying he and Trey were more like rivals than teammates.

programme.title: The Game: The Trey Wiggs Fallout Episode
programme.desc: When Melanie learns that Derwin is still upset about the bad publicity caused by her continuing friendship with an old football rival, she tries to find various ways to make it up to him.

programme.title: Moesha: Girl’s Night In
programme.desc: At a slumber party, Moesha and her friends reminisce (with clips from past episodes) about the past four years together.

programme.title: Moesha: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Kim’s mother, Nikki, is re-entering a journey she started 18 years ago. With Dee’s help, she will be completing her education to receive a high school diploma.

programme.title: Moesha: Had To Be You
programme.desc: An old boyfriend of Andell’s comes back into her life and proposes to her. Moesha tries to keep Andell and Moesha’s Uncle Bernie together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Moesha: The Prom
programme.desc: Moesha’s date for the proms cancels at the last minute. She goes unescorted and meets a handsome mysterious boy who disappears at midnight. She tries to find him, but to no avail.

programme.title: Moesha: Independence Day
programme.desc: It’s Moesha’s 18th birthday, and as a surprise, her family and friends unknowingly invite all of Moesha’s past boyfriends to the party.

programme.title: Moesha: I Studied Twelve Years For This?
programme.desc: When Moesha’s car breaks down, she, Hakeem, and Niecy are late for their graduation ceremony.
programme.sub-title: I Studied Twelve Years For This?

programme.title: Moesha: Good Vibrations?
programme.desc: A frustrated Moesha longs for a promotion from 'gopher' to writer at Vibe magazine but believes that her boss, Joe Scott, would rather she pay her dues with something other than her writing talent.

programme.title: Moesha: Fired Up
programme.desc: Eager to get on the fast track at Vibe Magazine, Moesha pretends to be a reporter to land a Maya Angelou interview. But her ambition, coupled with Maya’s advice, leads Moesha down an entirely different path than she’d planned.

programme.title: Moesha: The Party’s Over (Here)
programme.desc: Unable to resist the temptations of college life, Moesha and Niecy become regulars on the party circuit, until their attendance at a late-night frat party takes its toll in more ways than one.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Frozen Assets Episode
programme.desc: Mona's birthday goes sour when she gets an unwelcome present from her mother. While Dee Dee continues to struggle with her life direction, she is presented with a new career option.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Young & The Restless Episode
programme.desc: Mona becomes jealous of her mother when she begins dating a much younger man. Adam begins feeling like a loser when he realizes everyone is accomplishing their goals except him.
programme.sub-title: The Big Young & The Restless Episode

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Off Pitch Episode
programme.desc: Dee Dee enlists Mona's help when her agency's star baseball client wants to retire and embark on a music career. Big Dee Dee must break bad news to Phyllis when her cat, Fred, turns up missing.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big State Of The Reunion Episode
programme.desc: Mona must face old demons when she attends her 10 year high school reunion. Kai mounts an investigation after paraphernalia goes missing from the Delicious stock room. Spencer sets a date to meet the girl he's been corresponding with on-line.
programme.sub-title: The Big State Of The Reunion Episode

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big How To Do And Undo It Episode
programme.desc: When Spencer has trouble dumping his new girlfriend, he enlists Dee Dee's help breaking the news. After Phyllis's new boyfriend plans a romantic weekend away, she turns to an unlikely source for help with her sex life.
programme.sub-title: The Big How To Do And Undo It Episode

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Days Of Wine And Neuroses Episode
programme.desc: Dee Dee invites Mona to a 'girl's weekend' at the spa, but Mona soon discovers her sister has an ulterior motive. Spencer's view of the gay world is changed when he spends the weekend with Adam's well connected friends.
programme.sub-title: The Big Days Of Wine And Neuroses Episode

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Connection
programme.desc: P.R.S. is called in to help a young mother tormented by an otherworldly connection to a teenage girl murdered in her neighborhood years ago. Could she have psychic ability or is there a more sinister force at work?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Man of the House
programme.desc: PRS is called to help a grandmother and her frightened grandson when renovations on her 19th century house stir up the pipe-smoking specter of a former tenant named Alfred.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned
programme.desc: Jason and his family can no longer do renovations of an abandoned Kansas church, especially after they found their father in the basement crying and frightened because of the menacing activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vendetta
programme.desc: P.R.S. investigates claims of supernatural revenge in the Pennsylvania Poconos. When a client's new boyfriend moves in, does the paranormal move in with him? Or did her ex put a hex on her house and the entire family?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Homecoming
programme.desc: Ryan brings PRS to his hometown of Sumter, SC to investigate a chilling case where a young boy was tragically shot and killed on a front doorstep while trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A worried mother calls the Paranormal Research Society to help her son Matthew, a boy who sees dead people. Matthew's story strikes a chord with team leader Ryan Buell who also experienced paranormal activity as a child.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Mothman
programme.desc: Ryan takes his team to Point Pleasant, West Virginia to investigate his own personal holy grail of paranormal lore: the mysterious Mothman.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room 37
programme.desc: Darrell and Cherry, the owners of an historic Tennessee bed and breakfast built in the late 1800s, are reporting apparitions of a man and hearing whistling throughout the hotel corridors.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Death Room
programme.desc: PRS arrives in Ryan's hometown to help the new owner of an old southern plantation unearth its dark history.?A painful family secret reveals a tale of greed and neglect, and the team must help free its unwilling victim from her spiritual prison.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse
programme.desc: The clients are new, but the spirit is all too familiar as Ryan Buell prepares himself to battle the taunting demon that has been following him.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem
programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dead Legends
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey investigate the famed Hotel Conneaut in northern Pennsylvania. Heavy doors opening on their own, sightings of a boy, a bride and a menacing butcher have the hotel's staff on edge.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Sex Dungeon
programme.desc: Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey and Chad Calek join PRS for this unusual case of a sprawling mansion on Greyhaven Island near Detroit. Ken, the owner, hears voices and banging and it has him feeling both watched and cursed; a prisoner in his own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness
programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Good Vs. Evil
programme.desc: PRS visits a western Pennsylvania couple wracked by a torrent of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Old House
programme.desc: This week Yvette Fielding takes her Most Haunted team to Coalville and a house that is surrounded by mystery. The team seem to disturb the rest of some of its long-term residence as they battle through a night of terror.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Keithley Bus Museum
programme.desc: Once an old foundry, this large old building houses vehicles from a bygone era that are said to still contain passengers whose destination has never ended.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Judges Lodgings Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette heads to Presteigne, Mid Wales and the famous Judges Lodgings, were courts were held, people imprisoned and Judges stayed, but it also holds many a secret.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Judges Lodgings Part 2
programme.desc: Most Haunted continues its investigation into the Judges Lodgings where the team seem to be under attack and something is trying to get through a door…but what?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Codnor Castle Part 1
programme.desc: The team venture into a cottage where it is said ‘no living soul can endure living there’. With cursed dolls, murder and suicide this derelict place has everything to fear.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Codnor Castle Part 2
programme.desc: We stay with the team and find out what happened after we left them last time. The foreboding Codnor Castle Cottage maintains its attack on the Most Haunted team with dramatic effect causing Yvette calls an early end to their night in Hell House.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Birmingham Central
programme.desc: Yvette takes her team to a disused prison in Birmingham which has housed some of the most notorious criminals in British history.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Dudley Castle
programme.desc: The ruins that make up Dudley Castle house a plethora of paranormal activity for Yvette and her team to investigate. Strange noises and a violent poltergeist await them as they turn the lights out and do battle with the unseen forces.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Llanfyliln House Part 1
programme.desc: Workhouses were not the best of places to be, so why would anyone stay after they had died? Yvette takes her team on a memorable journey to find out. For a few team members it was a night they will never forget as they are pushed to the very limits.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Llanfyliln House Part 2
programme.desc: Whatever was making itself known to the team earlier, continues in this episode as something seems to be following Yvette from the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Beaumanor Hall Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette takes the Most Haunted team into the very haunted, disused attic at the top of this huge country mansion and are soon made to feel very unwelcome. Yvette is pushed to the limits and Karl is followed by a very heavily booted phantom.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Beaumanor Hall Part 1
programme.desc: This time Yvette and her team ventures into the dark abyss of the cellars under this large country house. Without exception every member of the team experience something unexplained as the darkness starts to come to life

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Moat House Part 1
programme.desc: This time Yvette and her team ventures into the dark abyss of the cellars under this large country house. Without exception every member of the team experience something unexplained as the darkness starts to come to life.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Moat House Part 2
programme.desc: Yvette heads to Tamworth and a beautiful manor house that is said to be filled with paranormal occurrences. Almost as soon as the team get there something seems to want to make itself known with dramatic effect

programme.title: Ashwell Prison As Live Pt 1
programme.desc: The Most Haunted tackle the deserted sprawling Ashwell Prison in this As-Live uncut episode. Feeling isolated and separated the team find themselves confronted by something in the dark.

programme.title: Ashwell Prison As Live Pt 2
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team continue to film at Ashwell Prison after being pushed to the limits tempers fray and Yvette is stuck alone, petrified as she is stalked by an unseen force lost in the corridors of the prison and the team scramble to save her

programme.title: Bate Hall Pt 1
programme.desc: Yvette and the MH team travel to the oldest pub in Macclesfield, famous for ghost stories and strange occurrences. Whatever is there makes itself known quickly and violently.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: For the Love of Larry
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark rescue victims trapped in a car, thanks to a helpful dog.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Another Kind of War, Another Kind of Peace
programme.desc: A man whose son died in Vietnam learns that he has an Amerasian grandson.
programme.sub-title: Another Kind of War, Another Kind of Peace

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: That's Our Dad
programme.desc: A children's-show host has a warm-hearted TV persona but is actually a cynic at heart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Love at Second Sight
programme.desc: Another angel is upset that Jonathan has been assigned to find a mate for his widow.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Love and Marriage - Part 1
programme.desc: Bickering couples go on a trip to learn what it was that brought them together.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Love and Marriage - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work to keep the three couples together.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Code Name: FREAK
programme.desc: A 12-year-old genius at college is treated like a social outcast by his less intelligent but more socially adept schoolmates.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Man to Man
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman would like to bridge the gap between himself and his son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Jonathan Smith Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Jonathan tries to convince a powerful senator to restore severe budget cuts dealing with health-care. However, the assignment seems doomed when the senator suffers a fatal heart attack.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Oh Lucky Man
programme.desc: Mark plans to give a recent windfall to a boys' club. But first he must deal with some con artists.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Basinger's New York
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's assignment at Christmastime is to show a disillusioned columnist that there's still some good out there.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark pose as priests in order to re-open an abandoned church as a shelter when a major fire breaks out in a neighborhood.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Wally
programme.desc: Wally is a hobo and street puppeteer whose caring and goodness have made him an angel without him knowing it.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Song of Songs
programme.desc: A struggling pianist tries to start life again after a heart attack.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Night to Remember
programme.desc: High school seniors hope they get the dates they want for prom.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Mother and a Daughter
programme.desc: An estranged daughter is writing a vengeful expose about her mother, a much-beloved movie star.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Normal People
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark visit a halfway house for people who were confined to mental facilities but released because they were deemed no longer a danger to society.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Hero
programme.desc: A Vietnam vet is denied government assistance, despite having lost a leg and an arm.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: It is Danny's first day as State Vet and when he helps rescue some smuggled animals he feels he's making a difference. However, he discovers the role isn't going to be all plain sailing.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny's first big project as State Vet is a major animal translocation, and he is desperate to impress. Meanwhile, whilst Alice is out in the bush treating an injured zebra, she is stalked by lions. She makes it back to her jeep in time but is shaken up.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Alice is still suffering from a loss of nerve after her close shave with the lions and so Danny tries to help her overcome her problems – the Leopard's Den lions have produced their first cub and he needs Alice back in the saddle.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: In his role as State Vet, Danny works with wealthy conservationist, Anton Ziegler, to catch a group of leopard hunters. Ziegler is also buying a tiger from Vanessa, who struggling with her finances, desperately needs the money to ensure Mara's future.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Du Plessis has started a one man campaign of vandalism against the new neighbours at Mara; Peeters and the mining company. When Peeters catches him on CCTV, Du Plessis is fined and given a restraining order to keep him away from Mara.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Du Plessis comes to meet Caroline's plane but he doesn't seem happy – he has seen that the mining company have already started building the road which threatens Leopard's Den.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: The family are making arrangements to leave Leopard's Den, all except Du Plessis who is steadfastly refusing to accept that he has lost his home. He won't use his share of the money from the sale of the land to buy somewhere else.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: The family have been squatting at Leopard's Den as they prepare to make their last stand to prevent the bulldozers from destroying their home. Du Plessis and Fatani bring elephants and a giraffe to dissuade the construction crew from moving in.

programme.title: Wild At Heart
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of Leopard's Den, the family are split across continents. Caroline, Liv and a heavily pregnant Alice are in the UK, while Danny and Du Plessis have remained in South Africa.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny returns to South Africa with Caroline, Liv and Charlotte. They are all excited to be back and are looking forward to seeing their new home, Clearwater Farm.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: Danny has been preparing his pitch for an Endangered Species Project. JLW, a pharmaceutical company, are looking to fund an environmental project and the family hope that this grant money will enable them to buy Leopard's Den and Mara.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny and Ed release two cheetah brothers together, a symbol of their new partnership, but not all of the family are happy about this new start. Caroline is still furious at what she sees as Danny's betrayal of Du Plessis.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: The family are still estranged following Caroline's decision to move back to the decrepit Clearwater house with Du Plessis. Rosie is determined to reunite everyone, and plans a civilised dinner as a step towards reconciliation.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: Danny is in prison, accused of murdering Peeters, but Du Plessis is determined to prove his friend's innocence by any means he can. Du Plessis' first attempt backfires disastrously when he harangues a police officer and ends up in a cell next to Danny.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: With Danny away, and Du Plessis undertaking an ignominious stretch of community service, Ed is left in charge of running the Endangered Species Project.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Danny and Ed are anxiously preparing for a review with JLW, the pharmaceutical company that fund their Endangered Species Project. They are desperate for it to go smoothly, and as a result are driving the rest of the family mad.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: Following the loss of their funding, the family are in dire financial straits. Danny and Ed attempt to get an extension on their mortgage but are refused. Fiona spurs Ed on, telling him that the man she used to know would have a plan for survival.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: Strange things are happening at Leopard's Den. The family awake to find frogs everywhere, seemingly having rained down overnight; the giraffe refuses to budge from the front gate and the cheetah is off its food.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Scabby Monkey
programme.desc: Contending with overweight cats and their over protective owners was not what Danny Trevanion had in mind when he became a vet. So when a scruffy, barely alive African monkey arrives at his practise Danny is fascinated by the challenge.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Second Case
programme.desc: A woman’s mangled body is found beside a lonely stretch of highway. When the coroner suspects foul play, Kenda is called in to solve the second homicide case of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Too Young To Die
programme.desc: A frenzied ambush at a hamburger stand leaves a 16-year old boy dead. Lt. Joe Kenda must cut through a mountain of rumor and innuendo in order to zero in on his prime suspect.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch
programme.desc: When officers respond to a shooting , they discover the body of a young man they know all to well -- police informant Jimmie Stevenson. it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Victim Zero
programme.desc: A brawl erupts at a local bar ends with the shooting death of a army solider. To unravel the murder, Lt. Joe Kenda most infiltrate a revered military institution, and expose a dangerous vendetta.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Donald Ott is found shot to death, friends tell police he didn’t have an enemy in the world. But when Lt. Joe Kenda speaks with family, he learns of a relative who might hold the key to the mystery.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead On Target
programme.desc: A young father-to-be is shot dead in broad daylight by a single bullet fired from afar. At the crime scene, Kenda recognizes the hallmark of a skilled sniper.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Timothy Peart’s Last Dance
programme.desc: When a teen is killed at a party, police question the guests and wonder if they’re all part of a cover-up.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Hail of Bullets
programme.desc: The murder of a young father stuns his close-knit community, but the investigation reveals a neighborly dispute turned deadly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down for no apparent reason. The case kicks into high gear when Lt Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: When firefighters find Victor Woods stabbed to death in his burning apartment, homicide detective Joe Kenda tracks Colorado's most notorious serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Kidnapped Poodle
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a valuable stolen diamond as well as the kidnapping of a little boy's poodle; he thinks both incidents may be connected.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Invisible Knife
programme.desc: March must solve the mystery of how a man could be stabbed to death by an invisible knife, while attempting to summon The Devil during a black rite.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Strange Event at Roman Fall
programme.desc: A wife reports her husband, a reclusive mystery writer, has fallen off a cliff. Suspicion points to her as the killer and Colonel March investigates.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Headless Hat
programme.desc: While on holiday in France, there is a murder at the docks and Colonel March is asked by a friend of the French police to assist.

programme.title: The Return of the Living Dead
programme.desc: Two employees of a medical supply company accidentally release a toxic gas that raises up the dead. Soon the town is overrun with flesh-eating residents of the local cemetery who are hungry for human brains.

programme.title: Project Legion
programme.desc: A young man trapped in his apartment with a swarm of demons outside his door must find a way to survive the night and escape from apartment 213.

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: This dazzling remake of the 1956 spine-tingler stars Donald Sutherland, Brooke Adams, Jeff Goldblum, Leonard Nimoy and Veronica Cartwright in an eerie tale of possession by "alien pods."

programme.title: The Resident
programme.desc: Juliet has found the perfect New York apartment to start her new life. But there are secrets behind every wall and terror in every room as Juliet gets the unnerving feeling that she is not alone. Starring: Hilary Swank, Jeffrey Dean Morgan, Lee Pace

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Picnic With Death
programme.desc: Peter's existence as an invisible man becomes public knowledge, while Sally's friend needs help when her stepfather plots to kill her invalid mother.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Play to Kill
programme.desc: A celebrated actress runs down a hobo by accident and a witness blackmails her, threatening to expose her secret.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Rocket
programme.desc: A top-secret rocket is compromised when one of the scientists runs into gambling debts. Peter heads out on a desperate search for the missing rocket.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Point of Destruction
programme.desc: Four tragic air accidents seem to point to the failure of a fuel diffuser being tested, but Peter suspects sabotage is at play.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Death Cell
programme.desc: An escaped mental patient comes to Peter, asking for his help in getting her fiancͩ cleared of a murder charge as he awaits execution.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Vanishing Evidence
programme.desc: A European spy kills a British professor and steals vital papers. M.I.5 recruits Peter to go to to Amsterdam and recover the scientific research.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Prize
programme.desc: In Scandinavia, at a prize-awarding ceremony, Peter must rescue a writer being held for speaking out against her repressive government.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Flight into Darkness
programme.desc: Dr. Stephens believes his anti-gravity research will endanger mankind; he destroys the papers and disappears. Brady is summoned to track him down.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Decoy
programme.desc: Identical twins Toni and Terry Trent are a popular musical act, performing for the troops on a USO tour of Britain. Brady volunteers to help Toni when Terry disappears at a Soho hotel where she had earlier witnessed a murder.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The White Rabbit
programme.desc: French authorities call Peter when a doctor brings in a white rabbit she says materialized out of thin air before her eyes.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Disguise
programme.desc: The Invisible man is investigating an international drug ring when his identity is stolen by a beautiful young woman and used to smuggle drugs.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Gun Runners
programme.desc: Terrorists in an Italian market gun down a family. This sparks an investigation into how the killers got the guns, which Peter is tasked with.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Power
programme.desc: Brady aids the heirs of a Middle East king, who has been murdered by his power-crazy army chief to regain their father's throne.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Shadow Bomb
programme.desc: Peter is called in after a malfunction with a light sensitive bomb and must disarm the weapon before approaching darkness makes detonation inevitable.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Life Saver
programme.desc: Bob inadvertently saves the life of a suicidal man who then decides to become Bob's best friend.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: I, Bob
programme.desc: When an efficiency expert comes to assess the Inner City Dental Clinic, Bob gets side shifted out of a job.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Mastermind
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret have a fender-bender with a local mobster, they accidentally turn him into the police.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Outward Bound
programme.desc: Bob joins his male colleagues on a canoe trip to a provincial park.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gary
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret thought they knew everything about their next door neighbours, until Joyce and Trevor introduce them to their grown son, Gary.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Very Fishy Christmas
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret experience a truly Canadian Christmas.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob's Burglary
programme.desc: While Bob and Margaret are sleeping, the local criminals, Beany and Boney clear their house - TV, video, microwave and electric toothbrush all go.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Blood, Sweat and Tears
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret decide they need to get fit.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Tale of Two Dentists
programme.desc: Bob's business is booming, and when Margaret chips a tooth Bob tells Margaret that he is unable to give her an appointment for sometime.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Night In
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret find themselves at loose ends one evening when, to their dismay, they find that there is absolutely nothing to watch on TV.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Shopping
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret, concerned at the amount they are spending in take away food and expensive local food shops, decide on an expedition to the Super Save Shopatropolis in Croydon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Holiday
programme.desc: This charming, witty animated series focuses on the ordinary lives of a middle class dentist and his foot doctor wife. Together, they tackle traumas as being burgled, going on a holiday and deciding whether or not having a child will ruin their lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: For Peter's Sake
programme.desc: Bob's brother Peter is a successful chef who has a cooking show producing in India.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Driving Bob
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have put it off for too long. They need to get their Canadian drivers' licenses.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Undefined Border
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret go cross-border shopping in the United States.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: Kevin is at it again.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: In a final and desperate last attempt to cure Kevin of his psychosis, Dr. Franklin prescribes him very strong experimental drugs.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: Kevin's psychiatrist enquires about his fascination for fire. Kevin describes blowing up his home the first time his father taught him to use a lighter.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: Percy is let out of prison and joins a militia group the same crew that the Spencer's uppity neighbors, the Bensons, have hired to kill them.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: Kevin ditches school to play pool at the Camel Toe, where he meets Victor the pool shark. Victor takes Kevin under his wing to teach him how to hustle.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: The foreman at the construction site across the street offers Percy $300 to fight in the illegal fights he organizes down at the docks.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: The Spencer's visit the mall where Mom meets her favorite soap hunk, Brock Brickleydale who she ends up stalking and almost killing.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: When Charlie Plunt's student loan money comes in, he takes Mom and Kevin to Niagara Falls after ratting out Percy to the cops.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: It's the first day of summer holidays and Kevin is bored so he joins a religious group.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield sits on Jon’s book and refuses to get up. Garfield thwarts a bank robbery.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon’s niece has to be retrieved by Garfield and Odie. Garfield gets confidence from a motivational speaker.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Irwin the Mouse wants to be cast and Garfield lets him be one. Wade visits the Sage on a mountain to see how to overcome his fears.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: The ancestor of one of the most hungry pirates sets sail. Philo is back to help give motivational speeches to the weasel and Wade.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield and Jon try to help out a sultan. Orson’s imagination takes Wade and Roy on an out-of-this-world experience.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon’s new next-door neighbor is a cat hater and Garfield has to find out why. All of the farmyards are caught in a repeating cycle of zany bits.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie go sailing on Jon’s new boat and a shark shows up. Michael can’t scare anyone until he enters the farmyard.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon gets to meet Vivacia, the TV horror show hostess of his dreams. Wade Duck is caught in a 60-minute style interview.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Peace and Quiet/U.S Acres:Wanted Wade/Garfield Goes Hawaiian
programme.desc: Garfield's morning nap is disturbed by Binky the Clown./Wade accidentally pulls the tag off a couch pillow./When Garfield gets the Hawaiian flue.
programme.sub-title: Peace and Quiet/U.S Acres:Wanted Wade/Garfield Goes Hawaiian

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Box O' Fun/U.S Acres: Unidentified Flying Orson/School Daze
programme.desc: Garfield plays in an empty cardboard box./Orson's science fiction book inspires Roy to play a trick./Jon sends Garfield to a school for cats run by an ex-Marine.
programme.sub-title: Box O' Fun/U.S Acres: Unidentified Flying Orson/School Daze

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Nighty-Nightmare/U.S Acres: Banana Nose/Ode to Odie
programme.desc: Garfield has a nightmare where he grows into a gigantic cat, climbing tall buildings./Roy has his feelings hurt when he is called "Banana Nose."/Odie meets with a tough alley dog and two lady dogs.
programme.sub-title: Nighty-Nightmare/U.S Acres: Banana Nose/Ode to Odie

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Fraidy Cat/U.S. Acres: Shell Shocked Sheldon/Nothing to Sneeze At
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie watch a horror film./Orson decides to hatch Sheldon./Garfield has a sneezing attack.
programme.sub-title: Fraidy Cat/U.S. Acres: Shell Shocked Sheldon/Nothing to Sneeze At

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield's Moving Experience/U.S. Acres: Wade: You're Afraid/Good Mousekeeping
programme.desc: Garfield decides to move away from home./Orson hypnotizes Wade./Garfield must rid the house of mice.
programme.sub-title: Garfield's Moving Experience/U.S. Acres: Wade: You're Afraid/Good Mousekeeping
