programme.title: On the Case: What Happened to Sarah
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl's mysterious runaway note raises difficult questions for police. Had she really left home on her own or had someone close to her pieced together writing from her journals to cover up an unthinkable crime.

programme.title: On the Case: A Hole in their Hearts
programme.desc: A mother of three disappears from her office in broad daylight, and the case remains open for eight years until two farmers unearth a clue.

programme.title: On the Case: A Stranger's Knock
programme.desc: When firefighters respond to a house fire they discover a woman shot and killed inside. Police must unlock the mystery of who started the blaze to solve the murder.

programme.title: On the Case: In Defiance of Evil
programme.desc: A 13-year-old does not return from her daily bike ride, and three weeks later, joggers make a grim discovery. Police connect her case to another girl's abduction and murder five months earlier, but it will take decades to uncover the truth.

programme.title: On the Case: A Wave Goodbye
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl is discovered murdered at an empty campground, located more than 50 miles from where she was last sighted.

programme.title: On the Case: One Month of Terror
programme.desc: After abducting a 17 year old girl in front of her home her kidnapper taunts the family with phone calls and disturbing letters. But a tiny mistake will eventually lead police to his door.

programme.title: On the Case: A Complicated Relationship
programme.desc: A beloved mother of four disappears just days after her stepdaughter vanished. Police must investigate to find out if their complicated relationship led to tragedy.

programme.title: On the Case: Unanswered Questions
programme.desc: Patti Berry disappears on the way to pick up her child at the babysitter's, then her body is found in a secluded wooded area not far from her abandoned blood-soaked car.

programme.title: On the Case: Gone in an Instant
programme.desc: In Lenexa, Kansas, young women disappear from their apartments as police piece together evidence showing the terrifying crimes are connected.

programme.title: On the Case: A Test of Patience
programme.desc: The unsolved murder of a teenager torments a small midwestern city for decades until a relentless team of investigators finally finds the clue that breaks the case wide open.

programme.title: On the Case: Scent of a Killer
programme.desc: The investigation into Sandra Iverson's stabbing death goes cold until a police canine team uncovers a trail leading them to an unlikely young suspect.

programme.title: On the Case: Shortcut to Murder
programme.desc: Paula Zahn goes beyond the headlines in search of fascinating mysteries from within America's justice system. A shortcut home from school causes a 14-year-old girl to cross paths with a murderer.

programme.title: On the Case: A Call for Justice
programme.desc: After a man confesses to a terrible double homicide, police must determine whether he actually committed the crime.

programme.title: On the Case: No One To Trust
programme.desc: A beautiful young girl vanishes on a desolate stretch of highway. Could the man in charge of the investigation be responsible?

programme.title: On the Case: Follow the Footprints
programme.desc: When a young girl's lifeless body turns up on the shore of the Feather River, police hope that following a trail of footsteps and discarded articles of clothing will lead them to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: The Long Path to Justice
programme.desc: A couple's daily walk ends in murder and a cloud of suspicion descends on the victim's family.

programme.title: On the Case: A Dream Shattered
programme.desc: When a young teacher fails to show up for work, her principal goes looking for her at her home, where he makes a shocking discovery. The case would go cold until DNA technology helps police track down her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Desperate Cry
programme.desc: A mother's desperate cry for help alerts neighbors and leads to a terrifying discovery.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder At Sunset- Part 1
programme.desc: A mother and two daughters are discovered floating in Tampa Bay after a brutal triple homicide. Police must rely on a victim who survived a similar attack to bring the killer to justice in this special two-hour On The Case.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Family Values (REDUX)
programme.desc: When Dante and Luc capture a Raider, Dante is caught between his sense of justice and his desire for vengeance.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Cell Game (REDUX)
programme.desc: When Dante loses Percy to corrupt Oberon police, he must work out a dangerous deal to free Percy, while she fights for her life in prison.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Blacklight (REDUX)
programme.desc: A cryogenic chamber in an abandoned section of the Tulip is accidentally powered up, and the legendary Colonel Bramwell emerges from a 50-year sleep.

programme.title: Dark Matter
programme.desc: Commander Truffault helps the crew out of a tough situation, and into another, forcing them to team up with another crew to complete a dangerous assignment.

programme.title: Dark Matter
programme.desc: After losing one of their own, the crew must race against time to retake the ship.

programme.title: Dark Matter
programme.desc: A retrieval op at a remote research facility becomes a dangerous and surprising homecoming for one member of the crew.

programme.title: Dark Matter
programme.desc: Personalities clash, long-held secrets are revealed, and the crew is rocked by a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: Dark Matter: Welcome to Your New Home
programme.desc: The crew of the Raza has been betrayed by one of their own, Six, who is revealed to be a member of the Galactic Authority. Two, Three, and Four are incarcerateed in the notorious Hyperion-8 Maximum Security Galactic Detention Facility.

programme.title: Dark Matter: Kill Them All
programme.desc: Incarcerated in Hyperion-8 and facing threats at every turn, Two, Three and Four plot their escape with the help of some fellow prisoners. Chief Inspector Shaddick attempts to force confessions from the crew.

programme.title: Dark Matter: I've Seen the Other Side of You
programme.desc: After placing a severely injured Six in stasis, the crew of the Raza attempt to throw the G.A. off their trail by laying low in an unoccupied region of space.
programme.sub-title: I've Seen the Other Side of You

programme.title: Dark Matter: We Were Family
programme.desc: When the crew of the Raza stop at the Janah 12 spacestation to resupply, Three is reconnected with his former crew. The Android also ventures onto the space station where she encounters an underground community of androids.

programme.title: Dark Matter: We Voted Not to Space You
programme.desc: With Six recovering from surgery, the rest of the crew turn their attention to finding One's killer. The Android uses a pirated upgrade to go undercover as a human and discovers that Jace Corso pulled the trigger.
programme.sub-title: We Voted Not to Space You

programme.title: Dark Matter: We Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: Strapped for cash, the crew of the Raza is looking for a job and Nyx has a target in mind, a freighter carrying a valuable drug called shadow. Once onboard the ship, however, it is revealed that the freighter is no random target.
programme.sub-title: We Should Have Seen This Coming

programme.title: Flash Gordon's Trip To Mars: An Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: With Ming's own men turning against him and the destruction of the Nitron Lamp accomplished, Flash and his friends return to Earth to a well-dressed heroes welcome.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Goodbye So Long (REDUX)
programme.desc: Soon after Dante reconnects with an old friend, he appears to be killed in an accident.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: The Most Wanted Man (REDUX)
programme.desc: The crew hunt a man whom everyone wants to capture, a man with the longest criminal record they've ever seen, and special powers that allow him to escape again and again.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: The Half dense Players (REDUX)
programme.desc: Dante is assigned to take custody of an unusual murder suspect, a beautiful artist plagued by strange visions that may threaten reality itself.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: A Dark and Stormy Night (REDUX)
programme.desc: Darius reconciles with Luc, while making peace with Dante, but the sinister forces that follow him are not far behind.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Supermax (REDUX)
programme.desc: After Rudolpho sells the Tulip out from under them, the crew scheme to take it back from the new owner, who wants to turn the ship into a maximum security prison.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: A Twist in Time (REDUX)
programme.desc: While transporting an insane convict named "Five," Dante diverts course to answer a distress call from a graviton research station on Triton, which is experimenting with the distortion of space and time.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Eat Sin (REDUX)
programme.desc: Under the effects of a space/time warp, members of the Tulip's crew find themselves alone in their own parallel universe, dealing with a separate version of their marauding psychopathic prisoner, "Five."

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: A domestic altercation outside Verdigre, Nebraska, ends fatally. Frances Thompson claims that she killed Dean Frank – wholly in self-defense. However, investigators are not so sure about these claims as they dig deeper.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: The small town of Enderby, British Columbia is shattered after well-loved residents, Derk Roelfsema and Audrey Foster-Roelfsema are found murdered in their own home.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: An intoxicated Kurt Johnson gets a ride home from a bar on New Year’s Eve 2010 in Cooperstown, ND. When it’s discovered that Kurt never got home, authorities start looking for him. Their investigations uncover shocking events.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: In the small town of Ozark, Alabama, Tracy Harris’ body is found strangled to death and dumped in the local river. With the obvious suspect being her abusive ex-husband, investigators struggle to link him to the murder and the case goes cold.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: When the brutal killing of a young woman in her home spawns numerous other horrific murders in the quiet suburb of Elkridge, Maryland, investigators look into strange appearances of brutalised mannequins in the area.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: When a popular New Jersey high school cheerleader is abducted and found stabbed to death in a water retention tank, the case takes an unexpected turn when another young woman is found murdered ten days later.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: When cancer-ridden Jack Jesse is brutally stabbed and murdered in his quaint Placentia, California home in 1998, police struggle to piece together why someone would want him killed.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: When newly married Carmina Anderson is found shot dead in her trailer home in the Rocky Mountains in February 1973, suspicion falls on her overbearing husband.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: When engaged couple Kimberley LaVine and Edward Smith head out on a road trip to Grant County Washington in 1985, they’re eventually found tied up, murdered and dumped in the wilderness by an unknown assailant.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: In the small rural town of Fayette, Maine, Ted Flagg returns to his newly purchased home to find his wife Judith stabbed to death. Investigators struggle to find suspects and the case is left unanswered for the next 23 years.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: After a multi-millionaire’s wife passes away and he finds new love through a younger woman he meets at a private club, they end up marrying, and also adopt her younger twin daughters in order to have the perfect family unit.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: In a remote town in rural Texas in 2001, Pamela Shelley is leaving her boyfriend Ronnie Hendrick and their toxic relationship behind when she is mortally wounded by a gunshot to the head.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: In the late 1970s, a young nurse by the name of Debra Clarke is found shot to death at her home in Coral Gables, Florida. The case finds only dead ends, though it’s discovered she was involved in a torrid affair with a married doctor.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Stephen Cameron
programme.desc: Gripping documentary examining the fatal stabbing of 21-year-old motorist Stephen Cameron during a motorway altercation in 1996.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Marchioness Disaster
programme.desc: The story of the Marchioness; a pleasure boat that collided with dredger Bowbelle and sank within minutes resulting in the loss of 51 lives.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Clare Wood
programme.desc: In April 2007, Clare Wood met George Appleton on a dating website and they embarked on a relationship together. Unbeknownst to her, Appleton was a criminal with a severe history of violence against women.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rochdale Groomers
programme.desc: Rochdale Groomers: Documentary examining the sex abuse scandal which occurred in the North of England and appeared to go undetected for quite some time.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Sutcliffe
programme.desc: Arguably Britain's most infamous serial killer, Peter Sutcliffe became known as The Yorkshire Ripper when he began murdering women in Yorkshire during the 1970s.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Countryside Killings: Graham Backhouse
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Life After Death
programme.desc: An emotional visit to a Civil War battlefield and a series of bizarre circumstances lead a Connecticut man to believe he is the reincarnation of a dead general. In Haiti, a man dies after a mysterious illness but returns from the grave 20 years later!

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Medical Mysteries
programme.desc: A skydiver who survived after falling more than 11,000 feet on to tarmac, and debating whether humans can spontaneously combust.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Texas Lights, The Bloop, Vanishing Boat
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Texas Lights, The Bloop, Vanishing Boat: Residents of a Texas town report strange lights in the night sky.
programme.sub-title: Texas Lights, The Bloop, Vanishing Boat

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Cellular Memory, Ice Circles, Chimera
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Cellular Memory, Ice Circles, Chimera: Check out a heart patient's unbelievable transformation, circles of ice in rivers and a shocking DNA test.

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Parallel Worlds
programme.desc: An explorer finds a crystal skull in Mexico, believing it holds the key to another universe, and the bizarre machine that could uncover the secrets of teleportation.

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Paranormal Mysteries
programme.desc: A teen who thinks she can see ghosts, and a Californian woman who claims to have been plagued by an invisible attacker.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Amazing Survival
programme.desc: Amazing Survival: Incredible stories of people who cheated death, including a man who escaped from the avalanche of debris caused by the collapse of the World Trade Center.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ghosts In The Machine
programme.desc: Ghosts in the Machine: Three tales of everyday objects that are haunted by the dead, including the story of a man who is attacked in bed by an invisible force.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Premonitions
programme.desc: Premonitions: A look into the predictive power of the subconscious, including a man who warns of a plane crash before it happens following a series of vivid nightmares.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programme.desc: Medical Mysteries: Medics at a hospital fall gravely ill after treating a mysteriously ailing patient in a circumstance that can't be explained by science. Or can it?

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Sea Lions, Voynich Manuscript, Cocaine Mummies
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Sea Lions, Voynich Manuscript, Cocaine Mummies: A look at a mysterious medieval manuscript and Egyptian mummies containing cocaine from Peru.
programme.sub-title: Sea Lions, Voynich Manuscript, Cocaine Mummies

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: End of the World
programme.desc: Whether a super-volcano at Yellowstone National Park, Wyoming, could destroy civilization, and the likelihood of killer solar storms.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Sailing Stones, Brown Mountain Lights, Super Human Runner
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Sailing Stones, Brown Mountain Lights, Super Human Runner: A look at Death Valley boulders, mysterious dancing lights and super-marathon runners.
programme.sub-title: Sailing Stones, Brown Mountain Lights, Super Human Runner

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception: Check out mind-reading plants, pagan human sacrifice and Californian time travellers.
programme.sub-title: Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Bullet Proof Boobs, Amazing Coincidences, Directional Cows
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Bullet Proof Boobs, Amazing Coincidences, Directional Cows: Cows align with the Earth's magnetic field, and a young makes an incredible connection.
programme.sub-title: Bullet Proof Boobs, Amazing Coincidences, Directional Cows

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Monsters
programme.desc: A mysterious creature washed up on a Newfoundland beach, an animal attacking with its claws in New Delhi, and a winged beast haunting Virginia.

programme.title: Weird or What? With William Shatner: Freaks of Nature
programme.desc: A yacht vanishes on Lake Michigan and mysterious lights over the Indian Ocean send a nation into panic.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet: A high-rise window washer somehow survives a 50-storey fall and ball-sized ice chunks fall from the sky.
programme.sub-title: Falling Man, Space Rocks, Missing Feet

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Dolphin Saviours, Grim Reapers, Hysterical Strength
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Dolphin Saviours, Grim Reapers, Hysterical Strength: A look at dolphin rescues, death-smelling pets and a skinny teen with unbelievable strength.
programme.sub-title: Dolphin Saviours, Grim Reapers, Hysterical Strength

programme.title: Dynasty: The Gown
programme.desc: Alexis learns Galen is alive in Moldavia; Jeff plans to move to California; Adam and Claudia are married; Krystle pays a surprise visit to Sammy Jo and spots her double, Rita.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Titans (Part 1) and (Part 2)
programme.desc: Krystle is held at Delta Rho Farms while Rita impersonates her at the mansion; Dex is captured in Moldavia; The Colby family arrives in Denver to attend Blake's party; Jeff spots Fallon among the guests.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Decision
programme.desc: Dex orchestrates a dramatic rescue in Moldavia; Jeff discovers a clue to Fallon's whereabouts; Little Blake realizes Rita is not Krystle; Dominique places a mysterious overseas call.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Proposal
programme.desc: After reaching safety, a paralyzed King Galen is hospitalized; Joel poses as a doctor to gain entry to the mansion; Claudia inherits and oil well; Rita drugs Blake; Galen makes Alexis a powerful promise from his hospital bed.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Close Call
programme.desc: Sammy Jo panics at Blake's possible discovery of Krystle's captivity; Claudia plots with Adam to ger her oil well back; Galen promises to make Alexis a pwerful woman as he attempts to regain the throne.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Quarrels
programme.desc: Rita fears detection when Blake schedules an appointment for her with his doctor; Galen continues his scheming to regain the throne; Michael solely decides that he and Amanda will start a family.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Roadhouse
programme.desc: Joel tells Rita that she must sleep with Blake; Joel and the real Krystle are seen together at a roadhouse; Galen sends Michael to New York for help; Adam offers Bart Fallmont a bribe to insure the pipeline's success.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Solution
programme.desc: When Blake threatens divorce, Rita takes drastic action; Galen hides his recovery as he plots to regain the throne; Jonathan accepts a position with Bart Fallmont; Amanda receives a foreboding sign about Michael.

programme.title: Dynasty: Suspicions
programme.desc: Blake receives the fatal dose of poison; Sammy Jo discovers a suspicious vial; Krystle attempts two deceptive escapes; a fist-fight breaks out over the pipeline; Dex battles for construction rights; Alexis receives a call from a stranger.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Alarm
programme.desc: Galen plots his comeback; Alexis' long-lost sister appears; Joel and Rita plan their final move; Blake's life is in danger.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Vigil
programme.desc: Sammy Jo panics at Blake's possible discovery of Krystle's captivity; Claudia plots with Adam to get her oil well back; Galen promises to make Alexis a powerful woman as he attempts to regain the throne.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Accident
programme.desc: Krystle poses as Rita and escapes; Joel and Rita crash over a cliff; Alexis plots Krystle's demise; Dex confronts Galen.

programme.title: Dynasty: Souvenirs
programme.desc: A slanderous reporter causes Krystle's emotional breakdown; Fallon returns home concealing a disturbing secret; Amanda decides to divorce Michael; Dex and Amanda spend the night together; Alexis learns of her sister's release.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Divorce
programme.desc: Alexis finds Amanda and Dex in bed together; Krystle turns the tables on Alexis; Adam looks into Bart Fallmont's past.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Dismissal
programme.desc: Blake's hunt for Rita and Joel intensifies; Alexis drives Dex and Amanda back together while Blake attempts to separate the two; Adam threatens to expose Bart's secret; Caress pays a visit to Alexis; a humiliated Alexis promises Blake's destruction.

programme.title: Dynasty: Ben
programme.desc: Krystle and Alexis "mud wrestle" over Blake; Bart expresses his true feelings for Steven while a private investigator uncovers Bart's former love affairs; Garrett's suspicions about Jackie's Father grow; Alexis is greeted by an unwelcome guest.

programme.title: Dynasty: Masquerade
programme.desc: Alexis brings Ben Carrington to the masquerade ball; Adam's scheme to blackmail Bart Fallmont is realized; Garrett confronts Dominique with his suspicion that Jackie is his daughter; Alexis learns of Caress' secret book.

programme.title: Arthur: Get Smart/Baby Steps
programme.desc: Everyone loves HUGO--the new interactive whiteboard that claims to be 100% accurate. If only Mr. Ratburn knew how to use it. Mei Lin can say "hello" AND play the piano?!? Kate can't even wave!

programme.title: Arthur: Adventures in Budylon/Ladonna Compson: Party Animal
programme.desc: D.W. and Bud embark on an epic wilderness adventure--the backyard has never been so exciting! Apple picking, bake sales, craft classes…there's so much to do in Elwood City in the fall! And Ladonna's determined to do it all.
programme.sub-title: Adventures in Budylon/Ladonna Compson: Party Animal

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Weighs In/The Law of the Jungle Gym
programme.desc: When Arthur doesn't fit into his costume for the play, he's shocked to learn that he's gotten "husky-sized." He gets serious about getting in shape. Muffy found the perfect place to take pictures with her new digital camera: the jungle gym.
programme.sub-title: Arthur Weighs In/The Law of the Jungle Gym

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Writes A Story/Arthur's Lost Dog
programme.desc: Struggling with a school assignment, Arthur decides that his regular life is just too boring to write about. And, Arthur is the only one who believes in the superior intelligence of his dog. But even Arthur gets confused when Pal runs away.
programme.sub-title: Arthur Writes A Story/Arthur's Lost Dog

programme.title: Arthur: Swept Away/Germophobia
programme.desc: Arthur, D.W. and Buster are spending a few days at the beach. Can they save their sandcastle from the ocean tides? Buster's friends have had enough of his sloppy habits, so they band together to educate him on the realities of bacteria.

programme.title: Arthur's First Day
programme.desc: It's finally the first day of fourth grade and Arthur couldn't be more excited - until he learns Buster is in another class! Meanwhile, D.W. is nervous for her first day of kindergarten. Will Arthur and D.W. be able to make new friends?

programme.title: Arthur: When Carl Met George/D.W. Swims with the Fishes
programme.desc: George is excited about his new friend, Carl. Then George learns that Carl has Asperger's Syndrome – can they remain good friends? D.W. and James enter the pre-school swim meet and recruit their big siblings to coach them.
programme.sub-title: When Carl Met George/D.W. Swims with the Fishes

programme.title: Arthur: Shelter from the Storm (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: When a powerful hurricane hits Elwood City, everyone's affected. Ladonna's dad is called up by the Army Corps of Engineers. Muffy relocates to a shelter. And Arthur struggles to reunite lost pets and owners.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes A Movie/Go To Your Room!
programme.desc: Too young to see a real "James Hound" movie, the kids decide they'll make a film of their own. Next, how would YOU like to be four years old and completely misunderstood by your parents? And then be sent to your room for ten whole minutes?
programme.sub-title: Arthur Makes A Movie/Go To Your Room!

programme.title: Arthur: The Pea and the Princess/D.W. and Dr. Whosit
programme.desc: The 3rd grade class is putting on a production of “The Princess and the Pea,” and Prunella is at the helm as director! Then, Mom and Dad tell D.W. she’s too young to watch a new television show that everyone is talking about.
programme.sub-title: The Pea and the Princess/D.W. and Dr. Whosit

programme.title: Arthur: The Making of Arthur/Dancing Fools
programme.desc: When Matt Damon puts out a call for homemade videos for his TV show, he sets off a frantic rush as Arthur and his gang film their lives. Mrs. Molina is a teaching a dance class for kids. Will Francine and George be the next Fred and Ginger?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Breathless/The Fright Stuff
programme.desc: Will Buster's friends treat him the same after they learn he has asthma? Prankster have arrived in Elwood City--just in time for the "Scare Your Pants Off" costume party! It's boys vs. girls in what becomes a great big battle of the pranks.

programme.title: Arthur: My Club Rules/Stolen Bike
programme.desc: The gang can't agree on rules for their club, and each starts his own. Next, Francine's embarrassed by her crummy old bike. Why can't she have a shiny new one like all her friends?

programme.title: Arthur: The Chronicles of Buster/On this Spot
programme.desc: Buster learns that special effects can't take the place of hard work when conquering real mountains. Arthur is thrilled to find out that Sitting Bull once passed through town! He rallies the residents to mark the spot with a monument.
programme.sub-title: The Chronicles of Buster/On this Spot

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home
programme.desc: Inspired by footage of the moon landing, Buster wants to go to outer space someday! For now, it'd be cool to build and launch a rocket! Then, after costing Lakewood Elementary the win in a relay race, George wants to redeem himself.
programme.sub-title: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm
programme.desc: What's got moldy bathrooms, lumpy beds and lots of rain? Arthur's family vacation. Then, Arthur and D.W. go to visit their grandfather, but the visit doesn't turn out as expected, because Grandpa Dave isn't your usual kind of grandfather.
programme.sub-title: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's First Sleepover/Arthur's New Year's Eve
programme.desc: Have you ever been afraid of the dark? Despite D.W.'s threat of aliens, Arthur sets his tent for his first sleepover. Then, what exactly happens at midnight, December 31st? There are plenty of rumors, but no one seems to know for sure.
programme.sub-title: Arthur's First Sleepover/Arthur's New Year's Eve

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Wingman/To Beat Or Not To Beat
programme.desc: Does Binky have a favorite pastime? Not until citywide Bug Week, when suddenly all he can think about is butterflies. Then, there's a horrible racket in Elwood City, and it's Francine practicing her singing and drumming for the Talent Show!
programme.sub-title: Binky Barnes, Wingman/To Beat Or Not To Beat

programme.title: Arthur: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show!
programme.desc: It's the duel of the century as cellist Yo-Yo Ma faces jazz saxophonist Joshua Redman in the toughest gig of their careers at the Elwood City Library! Then, will Arthur be exposed as a baby show lover?
programme.sub-title: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Sells Out/Mind Your Manners
programme.desc: To earn the money for a new video game, Arthur decides to sell his old toys through his school's Web site. The Tibble Twins want to take Grandmother out to dinner, but she'd rather stay home. Is it because of their terrible table manners?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur The Wrecker/Arthur and The True Francine
programme.desc: Arthur always seems to wreck things, and this time it's Mom's computer. Can he get it fixed before Mom finds out? Then, Muffy A. Crosswire and Francine are absolute best friends, despite their rather obvious differences.
programme.sub-title: Arthur The Wrecker/Arthur and The True Francine

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Meets Mister Rogers/Draw!
programme.desc: Mister Rogers is staying at Arthur's house! Mister Rogers is a nice guy, but... his show is for babies! Can Arthur hide the visit from his friends? Next, the trouble starts when Fern draws a not-too-flattering cartoon of Francine.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Wrestles with a Story/All Will Be Revealed
programme.desc: Binky spends the day with Bitzi Baxter and learns what it's like to be a news reporter. Then, D.W., Bud, and Rapty set out to solve the mystery of what really happened to D.W.'s snowball.
programme.sub-title: Binky Wrestles with a Story/All Will Be Revealed

programme.title: Arthur: Cents-less/Buster the Lounge Lizard
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn decides it's time for his class to learn a little about money. For the entire weekend, no one in the class can spend a cent. Buster has the brand-new Dark Bunny Dark Buggy, complete with grappling hook and voice commands!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. on Ice/Spoiled Rotten!
programme.desc: D.W. tells her friends that she's a fantastic skater, but she can barely stand on ice! With a skating party coming up, how will she face everyone and tell them the truth? Accused of being spoiled, Muffy sets out to prove her friends wrong.

programme.title: Arthur: So Funny I Forgot to Laugh/The Best Day Ever
programme.desc: Arthur thinks his jokes about Sue Ellen's new sweater are in good fun but Sue Ellen's feelings are hurt. Has Arthur become a bully? Everyone is reminiscing about their "best days." Except Arthurs. Is it possible he doesn't have one?
programme.sub-title: So Funny I Forgot to Laugh/The Best Day Ever

programme.title: The Rhythm and Roots of Arthur
programme.desc: Pack your bags, buckle your seatbelts, and get ready for an ARTHUR road trip to the family farm! Arthur’s Great-Grand Uncle Theo is celebrating his 85th birthday, so the Reads (and Buster) are off to Ohio to join in the festivities.

programme.title: Arthur: Kids Are From Earth, Parents Are From Pluto/Nerves Of Steal
programme.desc: It’s Lakewood Elementary Parents Open House! How will the kids survive a whole evening of their parents' embarrassing antics? Buster is the only kid in Elwood City who doesn't have a Cybertoy, so he decides to 'borrow' one from the store.
programme.sub-title: Kids Are From Earth, Parents Are From Pluto/Nerves Of Steal

programme.title: Arthur: Around the World in 11 Minutes/Muffy and the Big Bad Blog
programme.desc: Pal, Baby Kate, Amigo, and Mei Lin enthusiastically accept Nemo's dare to travel around the world and make it back in 11 minutes. Then, Muffy discovers that web blogging is a great way to keep her readers up to date with her every move.
programme.sub-title: Around the World in 11 Minutes/Muffy and the Big Bad Blog

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Rides Again/Arthur Makes The Team
programme.desc: In D.W.’s heart lurks one big, gnawing desire--TO GET RID OF THOSE TRAINING WHEELS! Then, can Coach Frensky work with a baseball team where everyone is fighting about who gets to be pitcher and no one wants to practice?
programme.sub-title: D.W. Rides Again/Arthur Makes The Team

programme.title: Arthur: Caught in the Crosswires/Framed
programme.desc: Muffy is thrilled when mega producer J3 chooses her family for his latest reality TV project. After all, she was born to be star! Buster has just won the best young artist award at the Elwood City Arts Festival.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: The British Royal Air Force (RAF) played a pivotal role in World War II, notably during the Battle of Britain where it successfully defended against the German Luftwaffe's aerial onslaught in 1940.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: During World War II, the United States Army Air Forces (USAAF) played a pivotal role in the Allied victory. The USAAF fielded a diverse and technologically advanced aircraft, including the iconic B-17 Flying Fortress and the B-29 Superfortress.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Barbarossa Unleased 1941
programme.desc: E1 begins with a brief examination of the rationale of hatred projected by Hitler onto the Soviet-Slavic-Jewish world. Then it leaps forward, to see Hitler initiate an invasion of the USSR.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Time is Blood 1942-5
programme.desc: Episode 2 begins after the desperate German winter of 1941. Yet 1942 began badly for the Soviets, with more vicious Nazi campaigning seeing millions more Russians captured and starved.

programme.title: Hitler and Stalin: A Secret Relationship: Mistrust and Mutual Fascination
programme.desc: We have long ignored the "intimate" relationship between Hitler and Stalin, this mixture of mistrust and mutual fascination.

programme.title: Hitler and Stalin: A Secret Relationship: Two Tyrants
programme.desc: With the German-Soviet pact, Stalin and Hitler put aside all political logic to let the Western democracies believe that such a rapprochement was impossible.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Secrets: Fatal Liaison - The Strange Affair of Adolf and Eva
programme.desc: The protracted romance between Adolf Hitler and Eva Braun began in 1929 and ended in 1945 in the bunker under the ruins of the Chancellery.

programme.title: The Ultimate History of the Messerschmitt
programme.desc: In this program we look at the development of the Bf 109 which flew in all theaters of conflict in which the Luftwaffe was involved. More Bf 109s were built than any other fighter of the era.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Building The Brand
programme.desc: Hitler’s fascination with propaganda was born in the trenches of the First World War. There he saw it emerge as a potent tool of psychological warfare - one that he would harness to build the Nazi movement. Witness Hitler's early propaganda tactics.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Power and Persuasion
programme.desc: This episode explores Hitler's approach to propaganda in power; where persuasion was achieved through propaganda and terror, all in service of one goal: the creation of a state under one shared ideology. A new German power fueled by propaganda.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Why We Fight
programme.desc: This episode explores the way Hitler used propaganda to justify his warmongering, reframing it as defense of Germany’s people and borders. It investigates the role propaganda played for both Hitler and the Allies to mobilize their countries for war.

programme.title: I Have Never Forgotten You
programme.desc: I Have Never Forgotten You provides an intimate portrait of famed Nazi hunter and humanitarian, Simon Wiesenthal. This rare biography looks closely at the sacrifices made by one of history's bravest and boldest.

programme.title: Battle for the Bulge
programme.desc: The Battle for the Bulge was the last major German offensive move on the Western Front during the Second World War.

programme.title: Battle of Britain: The Race For Radar
programme.desc: On the brink of war the Germans mount a daring Zeppelin spy mission. Had the Luftwaffe spies discovered Britain’s greatest secret?'

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 1
programme.desc: This first episode covers the last week of February to late March. When American troops started their final invasion of Nazi Germany in February 1945, U.S. Army cameramen were at their side.

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 2
programme.desc: This second episode covers the last week of March to late April. The cameramen covered many stories of victory and defeat, death and liberation. Faces of despair and joy, scenes of war and peace.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Brittany & Bryon
programme.desc: Brittany finds love online with Bryon, a marine who may get deployed again to Iraq, she seeks Nev and Max's help before she runs out of time to discover if the perfect military man is real. (S4, ep19)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Mama doesn't always know best. Shuntay enlists the help of Nev and Max after her mum begins talking about marriage and uprooting her family to be with a man who refuses to meet in person. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Since Leuh saw surfer Justin it's been insta-love. But after two failed attempts to meet up, she wants to know if he's the man of her dreams or is she one in a long line of online lovers. (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Brittany finds love online with Bryon, a marine who may get deployed again to Iraq, she seeks Nev and Max's help before she runs out of time to discover if the perfect military man is real.

programme.desc: Tyreme met the beautiful Tomorrow online over 9 months ago. Tyreme is ready to uproot his life to be with her. Will Nev and Max be able help Tyreme finally meet his Tomorrow? (S5, ep9)

programme.title: 48 Hours: Relentless
programme.desc: A woman wages a psychological war against the person she believes killed her daughter.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Bad Bet
programme.desc: A bookie comes under suspicion when his wife is killed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Preacher's Passion
programme.desc: A preacher searches for answers about his girlfriend's death.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Walking Free
programme.desc: The story of David Camm, who was convicted in two murder trials -- each eventually overturned -- and was found not guilty in his third trial for the murder of his wife and two children.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Spies, Lies and Secrets
programme.desc: A report about the death of Shane Todd, a brilliant, high-tech engineer at a Singapore company who, according to his parents, was murdered because he was unwilling to share secrets that could harm the United States.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fateful Connection
programme.desc: A report on the investigation led by a determined detective to solve a 30-year-old cold case involving two young women who went missing in Florida, in 1982.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Blue River Murder
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 2010 death of Stephanie Roller, a Colorado mother of three who allegedly went for a walk during a blizzard and was later found dead in a nearby river.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death at Cottonwood Creek
programme.desc: Frederick Mueller says while he and his wife were out for a walk near their vacation home, she fell off a cliff while he stopped to take a photo of her. Was it murder or an accident?

programme.title: 48 Hours: Loved to Death
programme.desc: An investigation into the rise of violence surrounding relationship breakups among adolescents, as detailed in the story of Wayland, Massachusetts teen Lauren Astley, whose last encounter with her football player ex-boyfriend proved to be fatal

programme.title: 48 Hours: Last Chance
programme.desc: Attorneys work to get a death row inmate who confessed to a crime he didn't commit out of prison.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Dog Trainer, The Heiress, and the Bodyguard - Part 1
programme.desc: When a celebrity dog trainer is murdered, an heiress fears for her life and a bodyguard vows to be a hero.
programme.sub-title: The Dog Trainer, The Heiress, and the Bodyguard - Part 1

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Dog Trainer, The Heiress, and the Bodyguard - Part 2
programme.desc: When a celebrity dog trainer is murdered, an heiress fears for her life and a bodyguard vows to be a hero.
programme.sub-title: The Dog Trainer, The Heiress, and the Bodyguard - Part 2

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death in the Parsonage
programme.desc: An apparent suicide in a Pennsylvania church exposes a pastor's secret.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: One Last Hug
programme.desc: An updated report on growing dangers of dating and breakup violence, focusing on Melissa Dohme, who agreed to meet a former boyfriend, Robert Burton, for one last hug before they broke up forever. The decision nearly cost her her life.
programme.sub-title: Live to Tell: One Last Hug

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder at Sea?
programme.desc: The disappearance of newlywed George Smith, who vanished from a cruise in the Mediterranean. This report uncovers the questionable alibis, failed polygraphs and a provocative video that involves the three men who last saw Smith alive.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Daughter, A Mortgage, and Two Murders
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the murders of Greg and Bernadette Ohlemacher in 2005. The Albuquerque, New Mexico couple had been shot dead in their home
programme.sub-title: A Daughter, A Mortgage, and Two Murders

programme.title: 48 Hours: Decades of Deceit
programme.desc: An Internet-savvy investigator works to solve a decades-old murder case.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Ryan Ferguson: Wrongful Conviction
programme.desc: The case of Ryan Ferguson, who was released from prison in 2013, after nearly 10 years behind bars for murder. 48 HOURS team have been investigating the murder and the bizarre circumstances that put Ryan Ferguson in prison for the crime since 2006

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Confession
programme.desc: Relatives of a beauty queen who was murdered more than 50 years ago suspect a priest committed the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Highway of Tears
programme.desc: Since 1969, more than 20 girls and women have disappeared or been killed along a road in, Canada, known as Highway 16.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trek
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force matches wits with a hijacker and a disloyal prison commandant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bank
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is dispatched to Berlin's East Zone.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Operation Heart
programme.desc: The IMF races against time to convince the president (Pernell Roberts) of a small country that his chief of secret police plans to overthrow the government and seize power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Slave pt. 1
programme.desc: The IMF is called upon to end an inhuman situation which the United Nations has been unable to abolish: slave trade in the country of Elkabar, ruled by King Ibn Borca.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Slave pt. 2
programme.desc: The IMF continues to battle slave-trading in a Middle Eastern country by eliminating De Groot, one of the principal suppliers of victims for King Borca's slave market.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Widow
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is asked to destroy an international narcotics ring operated by Alex Cresnic and his partner Mark Walters.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Money Machine
programme.desc: The economy of the small African country of Ghalea is threatened by a mass counterfeiting scheme directed by Walter DuBruis, one of the country's richest financiers.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Seal
programme.desc: America's relations with Kuala Rokat, a small neutral country on the China-India border, are threatened when a priceless national treasure, a carved jade seal, is stolen and bought by American art collector, J. Richard Taggart.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Sweet Charity
programme.desc: The fraudulent international activities of Gerald and Catherine Hagar, professional fund raisers for charity, take the IMF to an estate on the French-Italian border.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Council pt. 1
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF on an assignment to destroy the syndicate, a criminal empire headed by Frank Wayne.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Council pt. 2
programme.desc: The IMF continues its fight against organized crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Astrologer
programme.desc: The IMF accepts a critical mission to rescue Nikolai Kurzon, the leader-in-exile of the Baltic state of Veyska who has been kidnapped by Col. Stahl (Steve Ihnat), head of the secret police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Echo of Yesterday
programme.desc: The resurgence of neo-Nazism in Germany takes the IMF to Bavaria, where Marcus von Frank (Hans Gudegast) threatens to become a second Hitler.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Photographer
programme.desc: The imagination of the IMF is put to the test when a massive spy ring in the U.S. headed by fashion photographer, David Redding, threatens to cripple the country with a deadly pneumonic plague.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Spy
programme.desc: NATO's missile defense system plans, mapped on two separate overlays for security reasons, are the target of a Central European spy organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Game of Chess
programme.desc: Recovering a million dollars in gold bullion is the job of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Emerald
programme.desc: The IMF is assigned to recover microfilm plans for manipulating international gold reserves.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Condemned
programme.desc: Jim Phelps comes to the aid of a personal friend.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: It’s Barney’s birthday, and there are surprises around every corner. Baby Bop is practicing her marching because she will be joining a real marching rhythm band and is having trouble keeping a beat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is sad because she lost her pet caterpillar, Monty. Barney and the others try to help her find it./Barney and Baby Bop are thrilled when BJ sets up a bug zoo in the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bop Til You Drop - Sharing
programme.desc: The park is especially full of kids today, but all of them are busy playing. Baby Bop can't find anyone to play what she wants to play. When the others notice she is sad, they tell her they will play whatever she suggests.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Easy as ABC
programme.desc: When Baby Bop uses the caboose mailbox to deliver a special invitation to her tea party, she discovers that no one can read her handwriting. Barney and his friends find creative ways to help her learn her ABCs!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: All About Me
programme.desc: Baby Bop and BJ have fun playing ball in the park. Barney helps them learn that trying something new can also be fun. Baby Bop prepares a special picnic for BJ, but much to his surprise, it consists mostly of her favorite foods.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Red, Yellow and Blue!
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bienvenido, Barney!
programme.desc: Baby Bop's friend Monty the butterfly passes through the park with a flock of friends on their way to Mexico. When Monty gets left behind by his insect friends and family, Barney takes everyone on a visit to Mexico.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Cousin Riff is moving to town. Barney encourages everyone to put on a special show.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney can't stop snacking on pistachios! Barney helps BJ explore the deeper meaning of team sports and friendships.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Seeing - Beethoven's Hear!
programme.desc: An ordinary game of "hide and seek" takes a not-so-ordinary turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park! Barney and Riff are happy to play along, but BJ thinks that his sister may be "seeing things."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When she finds out that Daniel is going on a trip the next day, Baby Bop wants to go on a trip as well. Everyone decides to pretend to travel the same way Daniel will travel.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: That Makes Me Mad!
programme.desc: Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry emotions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: At Home in the Park
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. BJ hurts his toe while pretending to be Captain Pickles.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Look What I Can Do
programme.desc: Barney's friends are playing a fun game of "I Can Do" where they each share something they can do. When BJ suggests having an "I Can Do" show, Baby Bop becomes worried.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Blame Game - Airplanes
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. Barney helps him see that honesty and taking responsibility for what we do is always best. together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Baby Brother
programme.desc: Barney reminds Baby Bop and BJ that although babies start out little, they grow fast. Through pretend play, favorite songs and fun games, they learn about the many ways we grow every day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Movement - Separation
programme.desc: When some children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race, BJ and Baby Bop decide he'll need their help. They show him several ways to get ready for the big race by warming up and stretching.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Three kids try to build a pretend farm with disastrous results because they won't work together. Barney and his friends try to cheer up Olivia.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: As he watches birds fly overhead, Riff begins to daydream of flying himself. After seeing all the Moms playing with their kids in the Park, Baby Bop wonders what makes somebody a Mommy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Venice, Anyone?
programme.desc: Emma can't play with her friends because she has to complete a school project about her family. Before you know it, Barney brings Emma on a trip to Venice to learn more about her great granddad.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Riff find a pirate map, but in order to find the treasure, they have to be able to count. It’s time for a music concert in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop can't find anybody to play with her. When the others see her feeling sad, they decide to play whatever she wants to play. The dinos and kids are planning a camp-out at the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A creepy spider inspires Barney to tell the story of “The Reluctant Dragon.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is surprised by the first day of cold weather, Barney helps her see that winter is a wonderful time. On a hot summer day, Barney teaches BJ about all the activities you can do in the summer.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Rabbits - Listen
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective. But all great detectives need a mystery to solve! One quickly comes his way when an animal nibbles on one of Baby Bop's healthy snacks.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Little Red Rock'n Hood - Differences
programme.desc: Baby Bop is having a hard time finding a story she hasn't heard before. Barney and the little dinos decide to tell her an old story with a new twist! They tell the story of "Little Red Riding Hood" in a whole new way...by singing it!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends are excited about a fishing contest. Barney tells Riff about a famous musician named Beethoven who wrote beautiful music even when he couldn't hear.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop, BJ and the children prepare for the Shapes Carnival in the park./When it starts to rain at the park, Baby Bop joins Barney and BJ inside the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is disappointed when their trip to the zoo is postponed. Barney tells Baby Bop a tale about keeping your promise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Make Music
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ have fun learning about music, rhythm and musical instruments. Barney introduces many different instruments and BJ dreams of one day becoming a rock 'n roll star. They discover that music gives everyone a happy feelin.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Haff-Inated
programme.desc: Allen's off his game without his morning coffee, but some fun items help him re-energize. The guys find a wrestling ring, and when Allen uncovers vintage animatronics, they remind him of his days as a theme park boat captain.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Unsinkable Ton
programme.desc: Unique finds lead the guys to some cool sales. They try to authenticate props from the film Titanic, Ton faces off with a rattler during a snakebite kit sale, and Allen gets into ice carving while unloading some chainsaws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Betsy's Last Stand
programme.desc: With their beloved bread truck on life support, Ton and Allen head to an auction to help save her. Will an industrial grinder and a classic Chevy be enough to mend Betsy, or will the guys be forced to say goodbye for good?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Big Crush
programme.desc: The guys battle it out with their fierce former-employee, while a shill bidder threatens to ruin the day. When all hope seems lost, a set of monster truck tires and a mystery box are their last chance to come out on top.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carnies & Armories
programme.desc: A tough group of bidders team up to take down Ton and Allen at auction. After a couple of wins, the guys try to sell an arsenal used by Native Americans and some vintage carnival gear. But will they get conned?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: It's Raining Ton
programme.desc: The guys take Big Sis to her first auction - and when things get ugly, she becomes their secret weapon. Ton tests out a "blob" and Allen gets shot with a riot gun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to a Hollywood auction and face a new competitor with a seemingly endless cash flow. After they uncover a triple barrel shotgun and an antique camel saddle, Allen confronts an old childhood fear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Without a Chute
programme.desc: After a tough auction, things get worse when the shop's landlord wants to talk to the guys. Ton tries to negotiate with him while Allen has to put an experimental powered parachute to the test to save the day's profits.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cashville, Tennessee
programme.desc: Ton and Allen hit the road for Nashville, where they rumble with a band of tough, high-bidding bikers. The day explodes when the guys discover a 37 millimeter anti-tank gun and a cowboy's rodeo saddle.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carolyn Goes Topless
programme.desc: A friendly competition with former employee Carolyn turns into a vicious battle for a 1968 Corvette Stingray, giving Carolyn the last laugh. Allen tests his Ninja skills with an antique sickle weapon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Win Lose or Joust

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Don't Taze Me Bro

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton-Geons & Dragons

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Sis Ducks Out

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Genocide 1942-1944
programme.desc: Genocide 1942 - 1944: Along with Treblinka and Majdanek, Sobibor was one of the camps used in Operation Reinhard, in which the Nazis murdered almost two million people.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: Ju52: Explore classic and underrated aircraft, from WWII fighters to the Screaming Eagles F4, showcasing aviation's evolving history.

programme.title: Hell On Earth WWII
programme.desc: From the Indian border in Burma to China, which has been at war with Japan since 1937, the war grows more savage. In Europe, despite having less resources than when he first made the attempt, Hitler renews his assault on the Soviet Union.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Armageddon 1943-1945
programme.desc: Armageddon 1943-1945: The defeat at Stalingrad in 1943 was the turning point of the war and convinced the Nazi leadership to intensify their terror and propaganda campaigns.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: The Mosquito: The Wooden Wonder
programme.desc: We trace the astonishing story of designers turning away from metal and back to wood to create a twin-engine bomber that could outrun almost any aircraft in the sky, yet deliver a bomb load greater than an Avro Lancaster.

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts
programme.desc: Ceausescu, led his country to ruin. His magnum opus: Casa Popurlui, a monument to his megalomania and the world’s heaviest administrative building. But could the rumors of an underground nuclear bunker connected to a city-wide tunnel network be true?

programme.title: WWII Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: For the men about to board "Miss Every Morning Fixin", the pressures of the War had been eased by a period of rest and relaxation in Queensland, but they were returning to war operations in Port Moresby, Papua New Guinea. They were never to return.

programme.title: Hell On Earth WWII
programme.desc: The United Kingdom is isolated as German forces occupy Europe. 17,000 Trains carry German armies towards the Soviet Union. With Operation Barbarossa Hitler launches Vernichtungskrieg, a war of annihilation.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Bomb: Episode 1
programme.desc: Did Nazi uranium make it to Japan in the final months of WW2? Were the Axis powers closer to a bomb than we think? Drama unfolds as experts shed new light on the hardships, challenges and secrets of a war-torn, pre-nuclear world.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: B24: The Liberator proved its worth in WWII over Europe and the Pacific, modeled after the B-17, delivering blows to the Axis.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1998, a 12-year-old girl and a 38-year-old woman are found raped and murdered. The case goes cold for over a decade until genetic genealogy uncovers the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1976, a young woman is found dead at a military base in Orange County, California. Using forensic genealogy, experts break open the 40-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1987, in Ohio, the nude body of 17-year-old Barbara Blatnik is found face down on a rural road. She had been violently raped and strangled. Could this murder finally be solved with the help of genetic genealogy?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1988, Janet Tinsley reports her 8-year-old daughter April missing after she fails to return home. Three days later, a man out jogging makes a gruesome discovery in a nearby ditch.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1963, a man fishing finds the body of a toddler who had been wrapped in blankets and weighed down by iron moulds; it takes 57 years to learn the child's name.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1987, a man finds his wife brutally murdered on the kitchen floor.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 17-year-old Carla Walker is with her boyfriend Rodney in his car when suddenly the door is ripped open by an unknown assailant. The man beats Rodney with a gun and drags Carla away screaming.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 16-year-old high school student Kim Bryant is last seen outside a Dairy Queen restaurant. Three weeks later, her body is discovered by three teenage boys hiking on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Mum of two, Linda Slaten, is found murdered in her bedroom in her Lakeland, Florida flat. She'd been sexually assaulted while her children slept and strangled with a coat hanger.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 22-year-old Diana Hanson fails to return home from jogging in Las Vegas. Her worried parents call police but in a devastating turn of events, news of a brutal murder scene emerges.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The decomposing body of a little girl is found in the Arizona desert. Detectives are unable to identify her, so the local community lays her to rest with the name 'Little Miss Nobody'.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1981, the body of Sylvia Quayle is discovered by her distraught father in her Cherry Hills home. It turns out that she had been shot, stabbed and sexually assaulted, resulting in her death.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: A young woman is last seen alive hitchhiking on Valentine's Day. The next day her body is discovered along a deserted road. It appeared as though she had been strangled to death with a bikini top.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1986, 12-year-old Michella Welch goes missing in Puget Park in Tacoma, Washington in the Pacific Northwest. That night, police locate her badly bludgeoned body and there is evidence of sexual assault.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The bruised and bloodied body of 25-year-old Naval recruit Pamela Cahanes is found in an abandoned lot near the Naval training centre in Orlando, Florida, in the southeast of the United States.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Stephanie Isaacson sets off on her morning walk to school, but she never makes it. That same evening, her family's worst fears are confirmed when the 14-year-old girl's body is discovered.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The body of Tonya McKinley is unceremoniously found lying on the side of a city street. She has been sexually assaulted, and it is clear that the young mother had fought hard for her life.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The naked body of Darlene Krashoc is discovered at 5:20 AM behind a restaurant. Hardened investigators are shocked by the brutality of this murder.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
