programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Tom and Kelley Clayton were an alpha couple: attractive, athletic, popular. Drawn to the professional hockey player’s bad boy reputation, she would later discover just how bad her cheating, scheming husband really was.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Debbie Griggs had three young kids, and was pregnant with her fourth. But she believed husband Andrew was sleeping with a teenage girl, and had threatened divorce. That’s when she went missing, and it would take cops 20 years to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Glenna and Marty Duram’s marriage was always volatile. They argued about money and Glenna’s gambling habit. Jokes about killing one another barely raised an eyebrow - until the day Marty was actually found dead.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: When Adrian and Jane Goldsmith met they were both hoping for a second chance of happiness; someone to grow old with. But police officer Adrian was a troubled man, plagued by paranoia and dark imaginings.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Sophie and Martin Cavanagh had a fairytale wedding. Sophie worked hard to give the family a better life, but Martin’s jealousy drove the couple apart, and he went to desperate lengths to stop her finding love elsewhere.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Manling Tsang and Neal Williams were youngsters who fell into marriage in a hurry. Neither was well prepared for parenthood or the responsibilities of adult life. Manling planned to rid herself of her young family in a scheme of breathtaking cruelty.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Alice Farquharson was the centre of her family. Her husband Keith was a police officer with a chequered history of misogyny and extramarital affairs. When Alice unexpectedly died, her family and police were shocked to discover the cause.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: From the outside, Assia Newton had it all. But she lived in fear of her violent and controlling husband, Kelvin. When Assia finally escaped, she dreamt of a new life. But Kelvin still ruled her life… and he would end it

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Kelly Cochran
programme.desc: When Chris Regan started dating coworker Kelly Cochran, he knew she was married. But he had no idea of the wedding day pact she had made with husband Jason. Chris had become entangled in a love triangle that would see two people lose their lives.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Mahmuda Khatun
programme.desc: Amin Miah wanted a devout, homely wife to start a family with. Mahmuda Khatun wanted a career, a social life - and her family off her back. Their differences were irreconcilable, and one of them would choose the violent way out.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Thomas Infante
programme.desc: Lisa and Thomas Infante were childhood sweethearts who grew up on the same street. It seemed inevitable they would end up together. But their marriage was volatile, and when one of them found love elsewhere, the consequences would be fatal.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Malcolm Webster
programme.desc: The women in Malcolm Webster’s life seemed prone to bad luck. One died in a car crash. Another suffered a mysterious illness. A third, a keen sailor, found her life jacket punctured. How long before police realised this was more than coincidence?

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Stephen Searle
programme.desc: Stephen and Anne Searle were the grandparents at the helm of a large, close-knit family. But Stephen was having an affair, and Anne had been pushed to drink by her husband’s controlling behaviour. Neither was destined to enjoy a peaceful retirement.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ann Marie Anastasi
programme.desc: Ann Marie and Anthony Anastasi had four children, a big house on a desirable street… and a younger lover living in their basement. It was a toxic love triangle, and one that was destined to end in tragedy.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Hannegret Donnelly
programme.desc: The Donnelly family’s neighbours knew they were unusual. Christopher and Hannegret were rarely seen outside the house, and the children were home-schooled. But no one could guess the violence taking place within their home - until it was too late.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chaz Higgs
programme.desc: High-profile politician Kathy Augustine married nurse Chaz Higgs after a whirlwind romance. They were an unlikely match, and when their marriage hit the rocks, Chaz decided to use his medical training to commit an undetectable crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Denise Williams
programme.desc: Denise Williams was devastated when her husband Mike disappeared on a hunting trip. He was feared drowned. But Mike’s mother Cheryl didn’t buy it, and after years of relentless campaigning, she finally uncovered the truth about her son’s death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Paul Novak
programme.desc: Paul Novak was a thrill-seeking paramedic who loved the hustle and bustle of the city. His wife Catherine was a homemaker and volunteer who preferred small town life. Unable to reconcile their differences, Paul decided to plan the perfect crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Janbaz Tarin
programme.desc: Raneem Oudeh came to the UK from Syria to escape war, looking forward to a brighter future for herself and her son. Everything was falling into place until she met Janbaz Tarin, a man who saw no boundary between love, obsession, and extreme violence.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Gamble with Death
programme.desc: After Donna Eskew calls off her romance with Glen, he corners Donna in a casino parking lot with a chilling threat. She'll have to use all her wits to stay alive.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Badlands
programme.desc: Marie DePalma, a shy middle school student in Detroit, is thrilled when an older student takes an interest in her. As their relationship develops, her life turns into a living hell.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: Deborah finds herself in a fairytale romance with bad boy Steven. But after they marry, Deborah becomes a subject to daily abuse. When she leaves him, Steven stops at nothing to get revenge.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Sex & Malice
programme.desc: After Ann Moulds is bombarded with sadistic letters from an anonymous stalker, she tries to get help from police. But with no stalking laws in Scotland, she's at her stalker's mercy.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Rachel Wilson's marriage falls apart when husband Darrell starts hiring hookers. But when Rachel moves on and finds the perfect man, Darrell erupts in rage.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield: Judgment of OJ Simpson
programme.desc: Years after being found not guilty of the murders of Nicole Brown Simpson and Ron Goldman, O.J. Simpson was back in a courtroom and again facing felony charges.

programme.title: Judgment With Ashleigh Banfield: Judgment of Mary Kay Letourneau
programme.desc: Some called it a love affair. Others, a crime. The shocking story that 34-year-old married schoolteacher and mom Mary Kay Letourneau was having sex with a 12-year-old student grabbed headlines around the world.

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 025
programme.desc: Murder of Erin Corwin – Pregnant Marine wife Erin was killed by her lover Chris Lee during a hike in Joshua Tree. Upset she planned to end their affair, he murdered her and dumped her in an abandoned mine shaft. Lee received life without parole.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 025

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 040
programme.desc: Murder of Shannon Rippy Van Newkirk – After Shannon missed her birthday, police found she’d been with co-worker James Bradley, a parolee for murdering his stepdaughter. Shannon’s body was never found, but Bradley was sentenced to 30-37 years.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 040

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 119
programme.desc: Graduate student Gelareh Bagherzadeh was shot outside her Houston home, followed by the murder of Coty Beavers. The killers were Ali Irsan and his son Nasim, enraged over Ali’s daughter marrying Beavers. Both were convicted; Ali is now on death row.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 119

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 027
programme.desc: Murder of Candice Cooper – A woman drowns on vacation with her boyfriend, who claims she was intoxicated. Investigators find no drugs but uncover his assault history. The coroner reveals she was strangled. He’s convicted of murder.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 027

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 077
programme.desc: Lindsey Lee, 31, was found dead in her bathtub after missing work. Coworkers at the Lexington County Sheriff's Dept. requested a welfare check. Her estranged husband, Jason Lee, was tied to the murder through data from his Fitbit.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 077

programme.title: 72 Hours: Evil Eyes
programme.desc: A dead woman is found in a park. It’s learned the deceased is a divorced landlady of a group home for transients. The suspect list is long; the clues to follow are few.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Angel of Death
programme.desc: An angel of mercy turns out to be an angel of death when the number of deaths in an Indiana Intensive Care Unit skyrockets. One astute nurse believes there must be more to this than just natural causes.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Game
programme.desc: 1995 - Houston, Texas. A lonely man calls a dating service and gets more than he bargained for when he is met at gunpoint and robbed by his “dates”. The women, dubbed “Thelma & Louise”, lure men with the promise of sex but then drug and rob them.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus
programme.desc: The bizarre murder of a world-renowned anthropologist over the Christmas holidays shocks staff and students at the university where she teaches.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Violinist
programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A wealthy Asian girl is kidnapped in Vancouver. When the kidnappers make the fateful error of using the young girl’s cell phone, police are able to track their movements and capture the assailants.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Sweet Killer
programme.desc: An aging hippy is going through bad times. When he's found dead in his home with a gut of antifreeze, it's a closed case. Then a shocking confession reveals a maelstrom of lies and a story of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Bull's Eye
programme.desc: A Girl Guide leader is found dead on the floor of her bedroom. When an autopsy reveals a bullet lodged in her brain, detectives learn they’re investigating a murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Thrill Kill
programme.desc: When a senior citizen is killed on a city street, authorities at first treat it as a typical hit-and-run accident. But as they investigate further, they begin to realize that the culprit is a thrill-seeking psychopath.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Mad Bomber
programme.desc: In 1996 a serial bomber begins planting bombs in public places and terrorizes the Prince Edward Island community. The mystery person leaves a strange swastika as a calling card, eluding capture for eight years.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Danger in the Woods
programme.desc: Three teenagers accompany a deliveryman to a densely wooded area for a drinking party that, before long, becomes a nightmare. Things take a terrifying turn when one of teens attacks the others.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Hustler
programme.desc: Three people meet - the son of a wealthy Frenchman, a Vancouver businessman looking for investors. Unbeknownst to two of them, they are the latest victims of a notorious international con man.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lust
programme.desc: One morning in the stairwell of a Toronto building, a guard makes a grotesque discovery: the dead body of a Filipina nanny. It's clear she's been savagely murdered and raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Predator
programme.desc: The phone rings in the middle of the night. On the other end of the line, the sounds of an attack. The couple that receive the call rush to its source and discover a horrific scene.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Entrapment
programme.desc: During an underground investigation of a notorious narcotics dealer, Cagney crosses the line to entrapment and expects Lacey to commit perjury on her behalf. Lacey must then decide if she stands by her partner or admit to knowing nothing about it.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Clinic
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) investigation of the fire-bombing of an abortion clinic places them on opposing sides over this controversial issue. When a patient is killed in the blast, they must decide if it was one murder or two.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Mothers And Sons
programme.desc: The detective must crack a mother's testimony on the alibi of her son who is accused of robbery and assault while Lacey (Tyne Daly) must deal with her own son's problems at school. Also starring Sharon Gless as Christine Cagney.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Filial Duty
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate the robbery and murder of a 70-year-old recluse as Charlie Cagney (guest star Dick O'Neill) is hospitalized with pneumonia. Meanwhile, a pregnant Lacey must learn to adapt her work routine.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Old Ghosts
programme.desc: Cagney is branded as a coward after a robbery suspect is able to elude her during a chase. She is suspended from duty, leaving Lacey to clear her name. Meanwhile, Cagney's brother Brian visits from California and checks in on their father.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Power
programme.desc: When Cagney is placed in charge of the 14th Precinct during Lt. Samuels' vacation, her fellow detectives accuse her of being on a power trip. Meanwhile she is disappointed that one of her first assignments is to force Lacey to go on maternity leave.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Play It Again, Santa
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) goes undercover with Det. Jonah Newman (guest star Dan Shor) to investigate a series of disappearing Santa Clauses and issues with music rights. Also starring Tyne Daly as Mary Beth Lacey and Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Rapist
programme.desc: When Lacey goes out on maternity leave, Cagney's is given a temporary partner temporary partner, Sara Jones. Jones becomes obsessed with a rape investigation and increasingly frustrated with the length of time it is taking to arrest the suspect.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Act Of Conscience
programme.desc: While Lacey is on maternity leave, Cagney is assigned a controversial new partner who's past of turning in other cops who have participated in illegal activity makes the rest of the 14th precinct question how long he will stay among them.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: D.W.I.
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) goes undercover with Det. Jonah Newman (guest star Dan Shor) to investigate a series of disappearing Santa Clauses and issues with music rights. Also starring Tyne Daly as Mary Beth Lacey and Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Gimp
programme.desc: While investigating a series of muggings of disabled persons, Cagney (Sharon Gless) gets a first-hand look at the problems they face and becomes romantically involved with a man (guest star James Stacy) who is handicapped and advocating for change.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Family Connections
programme.desc: Cagney has to rush to Lacey's side at the hospital, hoping that she can make it before the baby is delivered. Being around Lacey and her family makes Cagney have second thoughts about her life as a singleton. Cagney's father has a new girlfriend.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Post Partum
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) becomes involved in a case where a West Point cadet is charged with possession of cocaine and is refusing to help himself due to his honor code. Meanwhile, Lacey's (Tyne Daly) father pays her a visit after a 30-year absence.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Man Who Shot Trotsky
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) receive a second opportunity to nail a notorious narcotics dealer as Petrie (Carl Lumbly) and Isbecki (Martin Kove) go 'off-Broadway' to pursue a murder case. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Exit Stage Center (S04E19)
programme.desc: When a famous actress dies, the first assumption is suicide. However, as Cagney and Lacey investigate, they soon discover that she was murdered and everyone in the cast and crew of the play she was in has a probable motive for killing her.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Capitalism
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate the murder of a prominent and well-respected Cambodian immigrant lawyer and discover his business might not be as it appears. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Extradition
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are sent to Los Angeles to extradite an old 'perp' as Cagney meets her brother Brian's (guest star David Ackroyd) family for the first time in 12 years. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: A Safe Place
programme.desc: When a vial of plutonium is stolen from a scientist, Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) run up against government barriers trying to locate the lethal radioactive material before the thief becomes terminally ill.

programme.title: Rally TV
programme.desc: Rally.TV is the new home of rally where you can watch all WRC & ERC rallies, thousands of highlights and much more!

programme.title: WRC: More Than Machine
programme.desc: Carrying the weight of expectation of one of the most historic rally teams, Malcolm and the M-Sport crew are determined to make a mid-year impact in Portugal and Sardinia.

programme.title: FIA World Rally Championship
programme.desc: Relive the highlights of the FIA World Rally Championship, with summaries and analysis of the various stages of the competition.

programme.title: FIA World Rally Championship
